name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: one of the most pressing issues:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
---
| | Climate change is one of the most pressing issues we face nationwide. Every day, our friends and neighbors right here in FL-23 and all across the United States face dangers from disastrous flooding to record heat waves, and it will only get worse unless we respond rapidly.

**Just this month, the United Nations released a report stating that we’ve done irreparable damage to our planet. But there’s still time to fight climate change before the situation gets even worse.**

[**President Biden and my Democratic colleagues in Congress are committed to fighting the dangers of climate change and protecting our planet, but we need you on board to get it done. Will you sign on in the next 48 hours to demand that we take immediate and effective action to fight climate change?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34666867/302706495/-1514525158?contactdata=QOxVGlsexRA%2FGeV1XLZD%2BL64O6ZNi%2F2GzFcmjHe6DNNC1UrjJYQygVMxShZ8JvPW4mRBMv5r1tMthjnHTHmExCFKN3xjagH31T49b0fi9QOHEy5lWe0touCawt1cRkdd80GTVCKyglp2VmZOAthdkQ%3D%3D&refcode2=ceaf011d-2206-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=DWS_EM_PT_IA_210825_1_5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84NzYwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWFmMDExZC0yMjA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4lC2tBqAtOUvCe0406Lj3nEz20DIjplyNSodWMTLEpA=&emci=bac4457a-e005-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=ceaf011d-2206-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2066287)
******[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34666868/302706496/-1514525158?contactdata=QOxVGlsexRA%2FGeV1XLZD%2BL64O6ZNi%2F2GzFcmjHe6DNNC1UrjJYQygVMxShZ8JvPW4mRBMv5r1tMthjnHTHmExCFKN3xjagH31T49b0fi9QOHEy5lWe0touCawt1cRkdd80GTVCKyglp2VmZOAthdkQ%3D%3D&refcode2=ceaf011d-2206-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=DWS_EM_PT_IA_210825_1_5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84NzYwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWFmMDExZC0yMjA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4lC2tBqAtOUvCe0406Lj3nEz20DIjplyNSodWMTLEpA=&emci=bac4457a-e005-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=ceaf011d-2206-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2066287)******
The UN report was alarming to read, but made it clear that we still have time to protect our planet from even more destruction.

That starts with investing in green energy sources and cleaner, more sustainable practices. We must come together to fight climate change and ensure that our planet is preserved for future generations.

[**Please join us in this fight to protect our planet. There’s no time to waste!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34666869/302706497/-1514525158?contactdata=QOxVGlsexRA%2FGeV1XLZD%2BL64O6ZNi%2F2GzFcmjHe6DNNC1UrjJYQygVMxShZ8JvPW4mRBMv5r1tMthjnHTHmExCFKN3xjagH31T49b0fi9QOHEy5lWe0touCawt1cRkdd80GTVCKyglp2VmZOAthdkQ%3D%3D&refcode2=ceaf011d-2206-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=DWS_EM_PT_IA_210825_1_5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84NzYwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWFmMDExZC0yMjA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4lC2tBqAtOUvCe0406Lj3nEz20DIjplyNSodWMTLEpA=&emci=bac4457a-e005-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=ceaf011d-2206-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2066287)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I always want to be honest with you, even when it isn’t good news
body:
It’s Marco here.
|
---
| | | | Peter, it's Marco here.

I know that by now you have probably seen the new poll that shows me statistically tied with my Trump Impeachment Manager Opponent:
**MARCO RUBIO (R-FL): 48%
VAL DEMINGS (D-FL): 46%**
I've sent you messages about how important this is, but it seems like you think it doesn't matter. I haven't seen your name on the list of supporters who have stepped up to protect the successes we made under President Trump's leadership. I'm starting to think you've given up.
---
| | | [STAY IN THIS FIGHT >>](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=29eb4a8ac8bb4ad29bd76bcc57c46c93&_e=oGVxQcyzjnQG3m2m6s1dqg6Pct_i14hpv9z18mVxXfGFEWhrHKGuk2F38iYOZHDsd-iJ97h-ji8T4tarNMYMnWd2t0jnBK4Y2vg0lKMo-fwHPGvWg9c-ATShXB0I0BIcL-OjAQ_oeK_OOZ0PG2AnA2wLj7bIcV8I4Zn5SC-8wYRbvmjjbCxT7YE-s6z0J2PQSOk0WKAPHx69LvEjDN-V3a04kCDWgroRFuxgVBxBnZmoVMvsni4HlvdLINT2WcJk8qqh7T3KQ_EvljIzktEMstLH2w86CxyjsfRfPh20V-AGeyxNZsEFuA-yKBl3eX-GJKCvsXQlgwTPigByood3twY_Cklu5ooBoxSDpx6fkwrBmWIwHRVOUolAlATTPB5XN2KX2KROuucq7chCrrV2gijRdqa0WQFmoqzmuEuLt4aN5_3rosI00382GaFhGpEtUE3rrpbwxVq3zGjrb9TkjOkXE_JL9uBN_TXGaMXn1eW4sM8YInmbkUgfrhgK8shw18XpYX0qnGLKb1FstvJV6mHvCm2vl35G4m2hQ0jt_3UDh_lJOZRrlU4oB274tjb_ "STAY IN THIS FIGHT>>")
---
| I know that things may look tough right now, but giving up now is exactly what liberals want you to do. To show you just how important this is, I want to remind you what all is at stake.

Here's what President Trump and I accomplished that Democrats are trying to erase:
* We cut taxes for hard-working families
* We fully funded our military to eliminate threats coming from other countries
* We fought to secure our borders and stop illegal immigrants from bringing crime into America
* We supported small businesses when COVID shut the country down
* We took on China and the big businesses living in their pocket
* We fought for American jobs to stay right here in America
* **But above all, we fought for YOU, Peter**

The fight for all the progress we made under President Trump is separated by just 2%.I don't want my next update to be that we're losing by 2%. This is where you come in.

My team and I decided that in order to stay in this race and stay competitive, we need to raise $20,000. **[If you can spare even just $10 today, you can help us reach that goal by midnight, so please, please, send in whatever you can as soon as possible>>](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=29eb4a8ac8bb4ad29bd76bcc57c46c93&_e=oGVxQcyzjnQG3m2m6s1dqg6Pct_i14hpv9z18mVxXfGFEWhrHKGuk2F38iYOZHDsd-iJ97h-ji8T4tarNMYMnWd2t0jnBK4Y2vg0lKMo-fwHPGvWg9c-ATShXB0I0BIcL-OjAQ_oeK_OOZ0PG2AnA2wLj7bIcV8I4Zn5SC-8wYRbvmjjbCxT7YE-s6z0J2PQSOk0WKAPHx69LvEjDN-V3a04kCDWgroRFuxgVBxBnZmoVMvsni4HlvdLINT2WcJk8qqh7T3KQ_EvljIzktEMstLH2w86CxyjsfRfPh20V-AGeyxNZsEFuA-yKBl3eX-GJKCvsXQlgwTPigByood3twY_Cklu5ooBoxSDpx6fkwpl2rYGlt0OyR0SJothhtfFVT2SeHH_NDUGzQ21nhMAk_k1dB-sJCO4qZeOqDMgdgOU2H8PY8K_Ucc7wYg7tdH4dFK_Q7GxRIxYtASnQUlt_EXu8iI6bxh0DxYUcdvJxzwY-Q7BFaVNzdh9ign7Y48vvJ_HZi3hoXPO0qI8n-Q3nibd4u0ob9c8uZtcWUtTTc1jKOJVgLs_vc-MKH6zqyHg "If you can spare even just $10 today, you can help us reach that goal by midnight, so please, please, send in whatever you can as soon as possible>>")**

My opponent is spending over $300,000 every week to keep her ads up and running. Can you believe that? $300,000 EVERY WEEK. When I found that out, I thought there was no way, and I even checked myself. I can report that she is indeed spending that and has her Democrat allies spending even more.

I always knew I'd be outraised and outspent. Fox News even said this would be "the most expensive race in U.S. history." However, I never thought the polls would show us this tight this early. Even that took me by surprise, but I guess with how much she's spending, I should've known this would happen.

I hope this extremely tight poll is a wake up call. If we don't step things up now, we will fall behind. I know it seems early, I really do. I never planned to be reaching out like this in August of 2021. It's still summer and the kids are just heading back to school (we're going through the same thing here at our house), so **I understand you 're busy, but sending in a donation on our online checkout system will only take a minute tops:**
---
| | | [MAKE A DONATION >>](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=29eb4a8ac8bb4ad29bd76bcc57c46c93&_e=oGVxQcyzjnQG3m2m6s1dqg6Pct_i14hpv9z18mVxXfGFEWhrHKGuk2F38iYOZHDsd-iJ97h-ji8T4tarNMYMnWd2t0jnBK4Y2vg0lKMo-fwHPGvWg9c-ATShXB0I0BIcL-OjAQ_oeK_OOZ0PG2AnA2wLj7bIcV8I4Zn5SC-8wYRbvmjjbCxT7YE-s6z0J2PQSOk0WKAPHx69LvEjDN-V3a04kCDWgroRFuxgVBxBnZmoVMvsni4HlvdLINT2WcJk8qqh7T3KQ_EvljIzktEMstLH2w86CxyjsfRfPh20V-AGeyxNZsEFuA-yKBl3eX-GJKCvsXQlgwTPigByood3twY_Cklu5ooBoxSDpx6fkwrlTxmTVa1CA7MsI9drgV6q9AlwocVxf_SKcT_T2eRwOEiSN1SEqkPKKmmqfyLiTJDyXEggG88_fFrOD-HObef4azcPYOF5qOJya3EPyEMbgblRlRSAVfyPhkpl6ra2YsS2hWzWmV4PPHoxUP6dmd6mcIrhNbjpBesnsa71kAkE3xo9uqtks2QwQZYSJVzag2vyWNC-OKC2BLFasxh9GEcp "MAKE A DONATION>>")
---
| I know you haven't donated yet since the poll came out, which is why I had to personally reach out. I know this news is disheartening, but I'm nowhere near giving up yet, and I wanted to let you know why you shouldn't either.

Thank you for your time,
Marco Rubio
---

P.O. Box 661537
Miami, FL 33266

[Privacy Policy](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=29eb4a8ac8bb4ad29bd76bcc57c46c93&_e=oGVxQcyzjnQG3m2m6s1dqluyAzqWu-f1HsjaV6pL2tP3nXzMUQIIqcHBTYJcLNRI5T7ITLkCBN-S4IjUeKzmmOal-QI0eftwV8ixoZaybMl06bt6vuiVQJ5XUT_2q4e0SgNFlBIjM_fEqZukc4fFgmUaPpajzV9lE0Dg_N9H8y3-vzJz1tVm3dTcM7DI9lrK3bnseQI4Z0MIy83_OgrR9h8h5jPdjutVcl15hsPtcnrolN7BdLHuWo2z9XuN1tnWVJGdWz1WBqnH1Cyozq_vTg%3D%3D)
Don't want to receive any more of our emails? [Click here to unsubscribe](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_s=29eb4a8ac8bb4ad29bd76bcc57c46c93&_t=pOrnpvG39eRqWQ6580O_mcYJ2NbiIHcAdsE_d7a7-238NUgCr2JWhSvjgYqqriu11QP_IGqV69Z2hRJ5xwdAK7U1dG-hYwO9JnCvZv0MsBXNIzFgWE-osqaaY348xpljimXU-HMLKj02f37ymeYbogppaKzuM-tuU6Z3LpUrH0k%3D).

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
We’re only missing your response from Cresco Democrats: | | |

clean_body: We’re only missing your response from Cresco Democrats: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. We wish we were kidding the last time we emailed you -- | [ [[YOU’RE THE ONLY CRESCO DEMOCRAT WHO HASN’T RESPONDED]] Do you think Trump deserves the 2021 Nobel Peace Prize? ]() | | | | Trump spent his ENTIRE presidency undermining this country. He spread lies about COVID-19, costing Americans their lives He separated thousands of children from their families at the border And he launched attacks to defund the Affordable Care Act, Medicare, Social Security, and the Post Office -- | | | Thanks for updating your response! \-- Ruiz, Research Team | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. Derek —

In late July, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to hold a rally.

During the rally he said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”

It's clear he and National Republicans are already ramping up their efforts to take back this seat.

We set a goal of raising $25,000 before Trump left the state to help fight back and keep Mark in the Senate. _But we didn’t raise as much as we’d hoped._

**We need to raise an additional $10,000 to close the gap and get us in a better position to respond to the attacks that are coming our way from all angles.**

**[So here’s the plan: Can you split a $25 donation between our people-powered campaign and Common Good VA today? We’ll put your contribution right to work in our efforts to hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6Fo33VD1VVWUBcb8t2VQUm5K2imUbBRcV3gmGdfVGmA6bCi1_klNyssT764to2aCgT51eKpVT36w7fIGc0G4lk9L0J8Fe9nBVnERhwSAhsPzPSAPtEMtMJ2AIvtjUHABmEL3txbY0qaZNKFepp5GlsQFbdC6vYYIl1kfdH1mwFkrjCrVSlv4MtC_L0A-11o_dlwB_Ksva-IUqIj5zVYuuEIBEpbz57Ib4FyXbpZkjA2DL7dmmIFWBiQOoEBnNqb4SNv010nvE3hxKVl9h313I1dPiRhwyCoK_IdD4ueMNdgvRuE-_ZMikVsOSXqPL4W0IKVnZw94Lkbn47LfAVXcXJUY/3es/fMa_yZcHQgmPT4sE0LQ4jA/h1/lLDRvMP14_7q4REBWhTxDRsTKVRb8Q1LG3qD2-T06Mk)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miLT6s1e0rffPNCDDVLmL6FsQ7Y038uSrWTvGVwJCe8YPuGlV8hOOBgVd10JjcFYMjLva2L-Pv9CT9Ef4yiOik7xJSgHNU8PPu-l13TCYgPsStsTCCpfoZB5-_EcpSHeZuVfDj0KdNXtE67R7vV8--PLr7Zy2EknALpisKJKRXJL_nMxnuwVlKs-sTMvn4jPwOHr4wZHtTL0OYn2SdDGVnsBTPnwulnW4wIEhJ8iwR1YrXQ45gZkGHGpvwiEdW9wk4mCY67P-_vvxvVF4UeVXtulVMEmiuYvlTOXlawFSPAYij7v5cR6kWrn2w02k7aqSFDyG1QBHd3aRWoiRWkhNFwHPz780VEaOwUO5uk4Q61KM/3es/fMa_yZcHQgmPT4sE0LQ4jA/h2/vQUaazK2QJ0XarffobWMvWZTV18pV_iyzjOgfpH03CE)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: [VIDEO] I recorded a message for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> |
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=697b796cd4f649f68541b4cf0acd0697&_e=1_yx9udAKxdGHpsFaPYDAw0jSgguFnVmGTH20ymCy4lzK_UOdxENs073oj_S_-e4D_3sG3zqmTZ8AeojKJy5QiWYqVbZOb6rqSCWUrfCf9Jv_odNf-Zft67nDtXy5G4E4T_WoP7Y_C-GhivBrt6tslnehzFHN1zyFHXlAMsf9aldlTFrdKWEdEM2Mw-EysX_1GWEUigQcJPQSaLmS7n_qeR8NrGoXGxzH-GcTRb68j9DWuFPS3NjN8fugpV6OLBeoBLHAwxn-fbBB1OifsdfLKVdO_gLdw-BQjjUybesl04_duW-z-rbM1-KsV0y0s3VEMX1xJKhqeEJX_Mq_dvT1Du7z503CLC9wvEhvrobxfjuxPCVQvztE03BRNM5tF3jn8V1PmH9oStWoS3YwmfEB58rKhBK_86YY5_xbcfaLXKEr_yR4I8pTe_m8vdjVO1fK7nVoQskAXxcuMd3ascDofubAIbyhkgHO4tFbFWTDZ8WoKLbkEjvzYdPiHitTzMm_sy95zfhc1CwVQnRiJ153Q%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[Today, I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=697b796cd4f649f68541b4cf0acd0697&_e=1_yx9udAKxdGHpsFaPYDAw0jSgguFnVmGTH20ymCy4lzK_UOdxENs073oj_S_-e4D_3sG3zqmTZ8AeojKJy5QiWYqVbZOb6rqSCWUrfCf9Jv_odNf-Zft67nDtXy5G4E4T_WoP7Y_C-GhivBrt6tslnehzFHN1zyFHXlAMsf9aldlTFrdKWEdEM2Mw-EysX_1GWEUigQcJPQSaLmS7n_qeR8NrGoXGxzH-GcTRb68j9DWuFPS3NjN8fugpV6OLBeoBLHAwxn-fbBB1OifsdfLKVdO_gLdw-BQjjUybesl04_duW-z-rbM1-KsV0y0s3VcHyp7eHeuHTIA6hRtRV-uEOwji4NwHDLQH0vyIQTkJ7lF5j5MM8v-sW49YqASLX1F0gP0fEnw4OJCr-JCutq2f9I5O7HEJWmh9C_ti64froZLgIkkGo9jP-ulhtOQxVoKqtUFRsbXid_X_uyYdvBs1QEsmxfmaQQ8iFNCoobXvH_7T1GaYwbzn4IIS02bLGF9-Pq9Toek2OakxmgnSsYvA%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=697b796cd4f649f68541b4cf0acd0697&_e=1_yx9udAKxdGHpsFaPYDAw0jSgguFnVmGTH20ymCy4lzK_UOdxENs073oj_S_-e4D_3sG3zqmTZ8AeojKJy5QiWYqVbZOb6rqSCWUrfCf9Jv_odNf-Zft67nDtXy5G4E4T_WoP7Y_C-GhivBrt6tslnehzFHN1zyFHXlAMsf9aldlTFrdKWEdEM2Mw-EysX_1GWEUigQcJPQSaLmS7n_qeR8NrGoXGxzH-GcTRb68j9DWuFPS3NjN8fugpV6OLBeoBLHAwxn-fbBB1OifsdfLKVdO_gLdw-BQjjUybesl04_duW-z-rbM1-KsV0y0s3Vqztlt6mgpd4UXbbbAwBp59E7hhnIipGDdOU_lWJtHr03wZsVemgLemNET9tNwVdFHDx54fVSZEwl70AUgumWaPOGR-v6bgRbfRzTFOPlLQqEPvGRQDN5aTrfvpxuz1ePitI7wNdlwWoaGwyIMipzjILPnTaiTy63UX2Xs7hBUCJPVSMZKq4gvd-qWLgemf01tjp5z5CswsLeR47Rc7UX3w%3D%3D)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Peter, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=697b796cd4f649f68541b4cf0acd0697&_e=1_yx9udAKxdGHpsFaPYDAw0jSgguFnVmGTH20ymCy4lzK_UOdxENs073oj_S_-e4D_3sG3zqmTZ8AeojKJy5QiWYqVbZOb6rqSCWUrfCf9Jv_odNf-Zft67nDtXy5G4E4T_WoP7Y_C-GhivBrt6tslnehzFHN1zyFHXlAMsf9aldlTFrdKWEdEM2Mw-EysX_1GWEUigQcJPQSaLmS7n_qeR8NrGoXGxzH-GcTRb68j9DWuFPS3NjN8fugpV6OLBeoBLHAwxn-fbBB1OifsdfLKVdO_gLdw-BQjjUybesl04_duW-z-rbM1-KsV0y0s3VnTYrHSBUAAXhvyJNA3qSTkxnAmDzEn7_zsA_wOD6K_q3gscERSwlXFeaDv_ltZHW8Z8wzMeO9GKXHi2PS-D_yL7yeXjHJfPXBR9UtJJV-tllJQq_TZMWneVS-xIKspSEkIsAfX_bROdbSGylVBxwrdvxjt30QgVKYpG4YJ_kOd7eMJtedpf1nscnn2Y_wwy6IVdXHDUvCf1H9mcgfWPJEw%3D%3D) **

Peter, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=697b796cd4f649f68541b4cf0acd0697&_e=1_yx9udAKxdGHpsFaPYDAw0jSgguFnVmGTH20ymCy4lzK_UOdxENs073oj_S_-e4D_3sG3zqmTZ8AeojKJy5QiWYqVbZOb6rqSCWUrfCf9Jv_odNf-Zft67nDtXy5G4E4T_WoP7Y_C-GhivBrt6tslnehzFHN1zyFHXlAMsf9aldlTFrdKWEdEM2Mw-EysX_1GWEUigQcJPQSaLmS7n_qeR8NrGoXGxzH-GcTRb68j9DWuFPS3NjN8fugpV6OLBeoBLHAwxn-fbBB1OifsdfLKVdO_gLdw-BQjjUybesl04_duW-z-rbM1-KsV0y0s3VruqjyrUIcImo3iLiXi3otyuqDnbbeWUfXGMlsl6Qy2rTdL02yGVhVKPHBWMJtJZF1T5IthrV5E3LxjurcX-meWaLgqxmQFgC2Xa-tkSI1aytmtROvYQVH36c1RJkm15FIxOX8TOGHjQhrjBLb87mXoYCUVbaBvmKp_3bnU0WyGuGceOSJ1xUBKvYjW3qSmKy0bEjqJt_qGdWUWyHaxTe0g%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

P.S. **[If I can ask you to do one thing today, I hope you'll watch my video.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=697b796cd4f649f68541b4cf0acd0697&_e=1_yx9udAKxdGHpsFaPYDAw0jSgguFnVmGTH20ymCy4lzK_UOdxENs073oj_S_-e4D_3sG3zqmTZ8AeojKJy5QiWYqVbZOb6rqSCWUrfCf9Jv_odNf-Zft67nDtXy5G4E4T_WoP7Y_C-GhivBrt6tslnehzFHN1zyFHXlAMsf9aldlTFrdKWEdEM2Mw-EysX_1GWEUigQcJPQSaLmS7n_qeR8NrGoXGxzH-GcTRb68j9DWuFPS3NjN8fugpV6OLBeoBLHAwxn-fbBB1OifsdfLKVdO_gLdw-BQjjUybesl04_duW-z-rbM1-KsV0y0s3VE-f0UW8c0r5e4DK3qtJx_5QrABox51XeGHiYtTyKSqJVGk7_-Fqf8uwWQEUVA8-bsZw6kouSPuk6hlC1tTxJqtNMcklgoF52TyEfJwINV0a7MOfR-ZxlMR9K_A41DC3iFTIlPjSdOGc3pyes6xClGZrMLnpyr2M0U1rrIe5lPU-qlqa3o3N9TucAlsGAayOTMK1z1Oerpico1rQ0UpaLaA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: I’ve officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> | Peter, Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream. He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League. That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams. From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams. But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground. It's time for that to change. Peter, I am proud to call myself a conservative. I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility. I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did. I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us. Peter, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

### [Should Biden Step Down?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trltttlt-kujkulhluu-j/)
Joe Biden is directly responsible for the worst foreign policy blunder in American history. And this is but the latest in a series of critical missteps. Is it time for him to consider stepping aside? Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trltttlt-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trltttlt-kujkulhluu-i/)

Although people may disagree on whether or not it was time to exit Afghanistan, very few think this was the way to do it. Read about it in this week's blog. Are you sick of people criticizing America? Yet people keep trying to get in, not out of our country. And the guy responsible for keeping illegal aliens out, isn't doing his job. Maybe he ought to be impeached. You can read about it in this week's blog. [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4b34f4325f3245b197f6ca058dc6473c&_e=hU-Yxn041RZlH1Oq5u9bZNzHacMQZdyEPOXX9KIEZZunnXPQh_Ey-iw4Ghs6p7H-xIg-NKXS069lKL1ekfEVM_TN8K-I7b-CMZrtvnKxJoxJVMQXpb7e9O4XLhaXJGSeRPpzKcHUlyEgx_tIzb6gKLIvJ6LxDEIpgeClkmCUmRzR3myFlTdvF3hKs6XAnhiO7No2ivXWIRlgtwUNh1OU6A6r81lHtEeFXaNz26AKGB7CWzYwnZhsy2fgVpB-zmLLInpSFoq8VfsWs3hmLDQI2bh5Qara1PwqxyaMCPOQicvv7CaXoctdkqIDoqW19NtvLMycYK8PqXv_YHdhO5d7j5uWYDAlOkWIu09xA72LAWO3NZqw2-M2ABObYgcotnufflnZijaBR2eiuuvI9gvfVPe9XZxK-KNb4t3Q0xcZF_lNrNXd6BsLkNd_UUz918UtnSifrFtdsnK681arhT7G-n4qps3uyG1JKoBhrZMpYms%3D)

Peter,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4b34f4325f3245b197f6ca058dc6473c&_e=hU-Yxn041RZlH1Oq5u9bZNzHacMQZdyEPOXX9KIEZZunnXPQh_Ey-iw4Ghs6p7H-xIg-NKXS069lKL1ekfEVM_TN8K-I7b-CMZrtvnKxJoxJVMQXpb7e9O4XLhaXJGSeRPpzKcHUlyEgx_tIzb6gKLIvJ6LxDEIpgeClkmCUmRzR3myFlTdvF3hKs6XAnhiO7No2ivXWIRlgtwUNh1OU6A6r81lHtEeFXaNz26AKGB7CWzYwnZhsy2fgVpB-zmLLInpSFoq8VfsWs3hmLDQI2Yl7DkRoSrUbKvXDV0Nl9Pet7nYVkswQLUBk6Pf3jxeE2jmuXXSKkD6GMkm94KwVC3rQtjyl1AihJFnBfrRR39sha0QVQcW34_T2uTUtVRzQM_AvCwDpuLLp-RUa5xTuiUPW9xAxELV5zsqe-U7GEvMWXZL0AsEIbqLux6RT0c_rkkWYXOS0WCJAEp5kjgNhRFIBGH9KfsOhmQdzc31RNbA%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4b34f4325f3245b197f6ca058dc6473c&_e=hU-Yxn041RZlH1Oq5u9bZNzHacMQZdyEPOXX9KIEZZunnXPQh_Ey-iw4Ghs6p7H-xIg-NKXS069lKL1ekfEVM_TN8K-I7b-CMZrtvnKxJoxJVMQXpb7e9O4XLhaXJGSeRPpzKcHUlyEgx_tIzb6gKLIvJ6LxDEIpgeClkmCUmRzR3myFlTdvF3hKs6XAnhiO7No2ivXWIRlgtwUNh1OU6A6r81lHtEeFXaNz26AKGB7CWzYwnZhsy2fgVpB-zmLLInpSFoq8VfsWs3hmLDQI2YyP8H3jHSpeUXm70FxL61zbnrChqrRlhPkfJ5YRevaypMxU8-vADcNU3gTAObfuBykLozs5uJGFqRQ8yShObDhdJho5y0_3tq5BmBvni-VcuG5n0TtFiGyIXz5mmgCNw1ZtXkArFhlLjvbXJnfh8pLfr8y9KI1uT0Dh1m_Byg-zF3T_qnYN05zUjWlGOVAp5t5ttYmr5Vdj22rZRzxBBr4%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4b34f4325f3245b197f6ca058dc6473c&_e=hU-Yxn041RZlH1Oq5u9bZNzHacMQZdyEPOXX9KIEZZunnXPQh_Ey-iw4Ghs6p7H-xIg-NKXS069lKL1ekfEVM_TN8K-I7b-CMZrtvnKxJoxJVMQXpb7e9O4XLhaXJGSeRPpzKcHUlyEgx_tIzb6gKLIvJ6LxDEIpgeClkmCUmRzR3myFlTdvF3hKs6XAnhiO7No2ivXWIRlgtwUNh1OU6A6r81lHtEeFXaNz26AKGB7CWzYwnZhsy2fgVpB-zmLLInpSFoq8VfsWs3hmLDQI2V-Sm3aUhOO-iN7Z03dwMrUZMrS-dMIUDoTT6Jmv1YI9xjZIRB2tDRfeeCogpqGOx7zG1j0h2PBh6HYxsNNYtJU5K8YuSGQGzAEgV7gACsOISeaLZcT3ZyXQqXS35r50ZmYWemt9rMRWaOJKLEh77y50_8h_BI1TwmiNUPe_mA7Ia5DZYRB6fg0Xm3GDk33sp9bRW72oVkNShMlfKM3idJU%3D)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4b34f4325f3245b197f6ca058dc6473c&_e=hU-Yxn041RZlH1Oq5u9bZNzHacMQZdyEPOXX9KIEZZunnXPQh_Ey-iw4Ghs6p7H-xIg-NKXS069lKL1ekfEVM_TN8K-I7b-CMZrtvnKxJoxJVMQXpb7e9O4XLhaXJGSeRPpzKcHUlyEgx_tIzb6gKLIvJ6LxDEIpgeClkmCUmRzR3myFlTdvF3hKs6XAnhiO7No2ivXWIRlgtwUNh1OU6A6r81lHtEeFXaNz26AKGB7CWzYwnZhsy2fgVpB-zmLLInpSFoq8VfsWs3hmLDQI2WpnyCiFMALi1C9jG7xGFwIejv594JfNGNCOKeX-Z_sphK-O1rOUSR3gROW55HmyxZ9rWPH4Eg_zPIzY_zjZkenBZ9Ghu4sAUdO-jMPECrFAmYGp3f3kDHuWANOJ1jirLKw3EEi3NBT6NyckxjmKMKkBOBQwPbCiEQsY10StpY18bklgNRn-8s7gR8ryJlTK_SZ-3hocrWgnjj3J73hWYB0%3D)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4b34f4325f3245b197f6ca058dc6473c&_e=hU-Yxn041RZlH1Oq5u9bZNzHacMQZdyEPOXX9KIEZZunnXPQh_Ey-iw4Ghs6p7H-xIg-NKXS069lKL1ekfEVM_TN8K-I7b-CMZrtvnKxJoxJVMQXpb7e9O4XLhaXJGSeRPpzKcHUlyEgx_tIzb6gKLIvJ6LxDEIpgeClkmCUmRzR3myFlTdvF3hKs6XAnhiO7No2ivXWIRlgtwUNh1OU6A6r81lHtEeFXaNz26AKGB7CWzYwnZhsy2fgVpB-zmLLInpSFoq8VfsWs3hmLDQI2XUx_nU_TRMwVycIJ_Ke7wGAi2Z84bBRA0Z2WdwVxtBoxfpH-SsrM5P6ybeByKD84Alu3d6aijZJr5weK0AeVtlcy71VDI3RblNQ9xX18_5F0IVdcoDudvZPiRDAo4FXgKAZdba4z1sDMUvytI2cADEPDE-QyW1wnaS_jaE6K5auwH0AbNEAwBLxQVcc63wc_XaaEaxg8RKwH9vaB19b1kY%3D)
Herschel Walker

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f7587bbb2cb34b1fabb73bd399683ec7&_e=nWkTBjzPG6l-cdjvbCiL32tyHF21HrTWD4uh1zU8owzYnE9vRltiEqWvuwBPLjC48UuKK_0NaI0xN1eaPLIZC-h2pxi_GV1NVbeGEmqgKH12nd7QvaiWfBcBkiIPzfU04EL16pXu0wHajCH4X6vspsZHBm2kkcK97Wk4MugGs6XyDp-2UyAGfKV2rTvRlwPM7BUI4ggxS2GOcQVeFZ6hOggIsk1YArLOyMNmC_oTUrOL3yKhsjEIIkigr2c1peaSGG9d3cK7kvXBT8jHsLr-cPSf5hoVofWC0AiB1LbmnPkY1DwN1Qdjle0VQeHpC-l_S3qEnQCgJt2CYTdJNzTkkoZ2tmzS4yj-y2jRiLlr17FhwYVkUHvhyf5bMHZn76ks9WXwmWZtITPD0lkx7yoi--iPB2TXaC246Sbfv6BHFYZIcBAJsPD10FxBeCHMbOKyU2isv4Uf9YL7uQj15uLI7A%3D%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f7587bbb2cb34b1fabb73bd399683ec7&_e=nWkTBjzPG6l-cdjvbCiL32tyHF21HrTWD4uh1zU8owzYnE9vRltiEqWvuwBPLjC48UuKK_0NaI0xN1eaPLIZC-h2pxi_GV1NVbeGEmqgKH12nd7QvaiWfBcBkiIPzfU04EL16pXu0wHajCH4X6vspsZHBm2kkcK97Wk4MugGs6XyDp-2UyAGfKV2rTvRlwPM7BUI4ggxS2GOcQVeFZ6hOggIsk1YArLOyMNmC_oTUrOL3yKhsjEIIkigr2c1peaSto00J7b01Yc6Pd_PlmknRaJh9k8MjCRxjgKothxJXErK3pC2zGRFBaPkLdUJkCnvwmIgFJZP00NgjDLrBP3ObxF0mo7Zn23yiweAZEhOal84Z4TqPhzmV4_ODinIz4zBibYIaX7XTRTn9_AysKJRvXQJNG8xyt4IF9iGhQH1racrN4V3BzaZ2a_OpDvF48qo8yrl5gHKsP1HaCLE-HKaZA%3D%3D)**

At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

Biden was found to have broken the law in terminating the Migrant Protection Protocols, or Remain in Mexico. Now, Biden must reinstate Remain in Mexico, one of my most successful and important programs in securing the border. Other State Attorneys General should follow suit and go after every one of Biden’s unlawful border and immigration policies.

Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump August 25th, 2021 ICYMI: “Biden Begs Middle East For Oil While Halting Oil Production In Alaska” Read the full article by Tristan Justice with the Federalist . | ---|--- Donald J. Trump August 25th, 2021 ICYMI: “Scalise: ‘This is President Biden’s Saigon moment’” Read the full article by Joseph Choi with the Hill . | ---|--- Donald J. Trump August 25th, 2021 Biden is destroying America. His policies have created a living national nightmare: he’s surrendered our energy independence, sabotaged the economy, surged violent crime, caved to China, crushed our citizens instead of the virus, created the single greatest humiliation in our history in Afghanistan, stranded thousands of our citizens overseas at the whim of Islamic extremists, and left a wide-open border to deadly drugs, vicious crime, and unlimited illegal immigration at home! I created the most secure border in history. Biden has created the single most catastrophic border disaster in history—by far. Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton, whom I strongly endorsed for reelection, has just won a major Supreme Court victory against the Biden Open Borders agenda. I congratulate him on this win. Biden was found to have broken the law in terminating the Migrant Protection Protocols, or Remain in Mexico. Now, Biden must reinstate Remain in Mexico, one of my most successful and important programs in securing the border. Other State Attorneys General should follow suit and go after every one of Biden’s unlawful border and immigration policies. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump August 25th, 2021 Our Country has never been so diminished. It has reached an all-time low! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump August 24th, 2021 How dare Biden force our Military to run off the battlefield in Afghanistan and desert what now have become many thousands of American hostages. We had Afghanistan and Kabul in perfect control with just 2,500 soldiers and he destroyed it when it was demanded that they flee! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump August 24th, 2021 Joe Biden lied to America and to the World when hetold us “America was back.” Instead, he surrendered to the Taliban, and left Americans behind to die in Afghanistan. This will go down as one of the greatest Military failures in American history. Now, it's the Taliban that is back – not America. This is not the America we know and the media refuses to hold Biden accountable for the destruction and tragedy he’s caused. It's time for the truth. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump August 24th, 2021 Biden surrendered Afghanistan to terrorists and left thousands of Americans for dead by pulling out the Military before our citizens. Now that out of the 26,000 people who have been evacuated, only 4,000 are Americans. You can be sure the Taliban, who are now in complete control, didn’t allow the best and brightest to board these evacuation flights. Instead, we can only imagine how many thousands of terrorists have been airlifted out of Afghanistan and into neighborhoods around the world. What a terrible failure. NO VETTING. How many terrorists will Joe Biden bring to America? We don’t know! | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- We are up against the FAKE NEWS media, their Democrat Partners, and Big Tech who all want to see us FAIL. We need to do whatever it takes to get the TRUTH out. Thank you, Donald J Trump 45th President of the United States P.S. Text TRUMP to 88022 to receive direct updates from yours truly. name: Herschel Walker
subject: [VIDEO] I recorded a message for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191155:6dOfQj2Nm:m:1:3253819041:B95D1DBC9AB72A6F6E0C554DE011B2CC:r)

---
Peter,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[Today, I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191155:6dOfQj2Nm:m:1:3253819041:B95D1DBC9AB72A6F6E0C554DE011B2CC:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191155:6dOfQj2Nm:m:1:3253819041:B95D1DBC9AB72A6F6E0C554DE011B2CC:r)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Peter, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191155:6dOfQj2Nm:m:1:3253819041:B95D1DBC9AB72A6F6E0C554DE011B2CC:r) **

Peter, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191155:6dOfQj2Nm:m:1:3253819041:B95D1DBC9AB72A6F6E0C554DE011B2CC:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

P.S. **[If I can ask you to do one thing today, I hope you'll watch my video.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191155:6dOfQj2Nm:m:1:3253819041:B95D1DBC9AB72A6F6E0C554DE011B2CC:r)**

[** WATCH NOW » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191155:6dOfQj2Nm:m:1:3253819041:B95D1DBC9AB72A6F6E0C554DE011B2CC:r)

[
](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191156:6dOfQj2Nm:m:1:3253819041:B95D1DBC9AB72A6F6E0C554DE011B2CC:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: We’re holding school boards accountable
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191345:Jq1kTj2HN:m:1:3253819041:63B93DFC3097024A3B6FEF7C378796E8:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191345:Jq1kTj2HN:m:1:3253819041:63B93DFC3097024A3B6FEF7C378796E8:r) Peter, School boards hold massive sway over the education of our children and the future of our country, but no conservative organization has been holding them accountable. **_Until now_.** I'm proud to announce the newest initiative of Turning Point USA (TPUSA) -- our **_School Board Watchlist_**. **To help us stand up against Marxist teachers, radical superintendents, and anti-American curricula on behalf of the 50,600,000 students shaped by their school boards ' decisions, I need your immediate support. ** [**My goal is to raise $24,000 by August 31. Will you help me protect students as they begin a new school year -- and put control of their futures back in the hands of parents -- with your gift of $12, $25, $50, $100, or more?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191345:Jq1kTj2HN:m:1:3253819041:63B93DFC3097024A3B6FEF7C378796E8:r) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191345:Jq1kTj2HN:m:1:3253819041:63B93DFC3097024A3B6FEF7C378796E8:r) Leftists have taken over the vast majority of school districts in every state -- likely even your district! The 13,500+ school boards across the United States ultimately determine how our children's minds will be shaped ... and whether they learn the truth about America's powerful history, Founding Fathers, and role in the world or whether they embrace the toxic, socialist, America-hating lies of the radical Left. Turn on the nightly news and you'll see the horrors of what K-12 "learning" has become in modern America. As socialism and "woke" culture infiltrate our society, leftist school boards across the country are:
* **adopting Critical Race Theory (CRT) curriculum** , ensuring students are indoctrinated with this dangerous Marxist vision of race;
* requiring teachers participate in **discriminatory professional development disguised as "diversity training"** and putting Leftist ideology before education;
* **renaming schools because of their "racist" namesakes**, which include national heroes like Abraham Lincoln and George Washington; and
* continuing to **use COVID as an excuse to maintain online learning** , despite extensive evidence that in-person learning poses little to no risk to students -- and knowing that online learning leaves many students underserved.

[**That 's why TPUSA's School Board Watchlist will expose the corrupt and radical decisions school boards are making, and then equip parents and community members with the information they need to demand a better education for their students! But Peter, I need your support to do it.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191345:Jq1kTj2HN:m:1:3253819041:63B93DFC3097024A3B6FEF7C378796E8:r) Right now, TPUSA is assembling the nation's **FIRST EVER** school district ranking system of any kind, focusing exclusively on school districts' acceptance or rejection of radical Leftist and anti-American curricula, textbooks, and policies. TPUSA's School Board Watchlist will expose: >>> Radical agendas being pushed by the nation's largest school districts >>> Leftist, anti-American, Marxist, and CRT curricula and textbooks >>> Corrupt boards and individuals who pursue anti-American policies >>> And more! We've published all of our findings at **[SchoolBoardWatchlist.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191346:Jq1kTj2HN:m:1:3253819041:63B93DFC3097024A3B6FEF7C378796E8:r)** ... and we're using our TPUSA megaphones -- online, on campus, and over the airwaves -- to bring national attention to the secretive, disturbing agendas being pushed by Leftist school boards so they can no longer hide in the shadows. [**But to have the biggest possible impact, I 'm asking for your support of $12 or more. Please help us reach our goal of raising $24,000 by August 31.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191345:Jq1kTj2HN:m:1:3253819041:63B93DFC3097024A3B6FEF7C378796E8:r) [**Support the School Board Watchlist**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191345:Jq1kTj2HN:m:1:3253819041:63B93DFC3097024A3B6FEF7C378796E8:r) The time to fight back is right **NOW** -- before it's too late. Thank you for your support to put public education back in the hands of parents and the community, **NOT** politicized school boards. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044 [Unsubscribe](${Gears.unsubscribe\(\)})

name: Patrick J. Murphy
subject: Afghanistan.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

The past week has been brutally tough. I want to take a moment to speak directly to my 9/11 Generation brothers and sisters who served and their loved ones:

I hear you. I see you. You do not need to shoulder the invisible wounds of war alone.

If you need to talk to someone, the VA crisis line is here to help. Call 1-800-273-8255 or Text 838255. Find the nearest center at [https://MentalHealth.va.gov](https://act.myngp.com/el/RpiGFufJHy-V7DEiXSKpuewP-Fq6KPRSJDQL0Y83HDE=/OymFStfsjuNHZ4daGlLE7sB9B9fQg9VMtEdMLvOtI_8=). For emergency mental health care, you can also go directly to your local VA medical center 24/7 regardless of your discharge status or enrollment in other VA health care.

This is a painful moment for our country, the Afghan people, and our veteran community. This war was not fought alone. We must do everything in our power to ensure the safe evacuation of US citizens and Afghan allies. It's why I've joined forces with General David Petreaus in advising No One Left Behind, which has helped thousands safely leave Afghanistan. To learn more about No One Left Behind [follow this link](https://act.myngp.com/el/RpiGFufJHy-V7DEiXSKpuewP-Fq6KPRSJDQL0Y83HDE=/aNzLRQ0xLeWTxrKVIP-UHiQIKmV1ATjQmx6RZltwKEk=?) to see how you can help.

I believe that both Americans and Afghans alike deserve better from our government. That's why I work so hard at _**[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/RpiGFufJHy-V7DEiXSKpuewP-Fq6KPRSJDQL0Y83HDE=/co3Kb6Kk0NXXn7quaj3vu6xyPw5bJtbqhz-pPGh8Ctg=)**_ to elect the next generation of veterans of integrity who will lead with honor in Congress. More than ever - especially now as we have the lowest number of veterans in Washington in modern history - [_**our work is vital. **_](https://act.myngp.com/el/RpiGFufJHy-V7DEiXSKpuewP-Fq6KPRSJDQL0Y83HDE=/co3Kb6Kk0NXXn7quaj3vu6xyPw5bJtbqhz-pPGh8Ctg=)

If you're going through tough times now or in the future, know that I am thinking of you and we are here for you. May we all remember our shared humanity.

In solidarity,
Patrick

Honorable Patrick J. Murphy
_[@PatrickMurphyPA](https://act.myngp.com/el/RpiGFufJHy-V7DEiXSKpuewP-Fq6KPRSJDQL0Y83HDE=/xKr9pXZxnILP99WyCw7xPuQD7F-JgVm3XHuboYhwUCU=)_

To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/RpiGFufJHy-V7DEiXSKpuewP-Fq6KPRSJDQL0Y83HDE=/qiFLP8W6XBcYNZNIi-EiXcacsCAHobIMcdBTdSAhvaM= "https://act.myngp.com/el/RpiGFufJHy-V7DEiXSKpuewP-Fq6KPRSJDQL0Y83HDE=/qiFLP8W6XBcYNZNIi-EiXcacsCAHobIMcdBTdSAhvaM=").
Checks may be mailed to:
Taking the Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol, PA 19007

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC

| | Peter \-- Recently we emailed you about CNN's latest rankings and where Georgia Democrat Raphael Warnock stands. **Warnock's seat was listed as the second-most-likely seat to flip in 2022 \-- and alt-right millionaire Kelly Loeffler is being recruited to run against him.** We set a mid-month goal of $2,500 to save this seat \-- and your support has been overwhelming! _We've raised $1,855 so far._ But Loeffler won't be the only alt-right extremist Warnock is up against in 2022. Just yesterday, Proud Boys supporter and domestic terrorist Edward Florea pleaded guilty to threatening the life of Sen. Warnock on social media. Here are just a few things we know about Florea:
* Florea wrote: **“** **Warnock is going to have a hard time casting votes for communist policies when he's swinging with the ... fish.”**
* He followed it up by writing, **“Dead men can't pass laws.”**
* When federal agents raided Florea's apartment, they found **more than 1,000 rounds of ammunition, plus hatchets, swords and 75 military-style combat knives.**

Florea is just one example of the right-wing extremism coming from the Republican Party today \-- and that proves that we must protect Sen. Warnock and his seat in the Senate at all costs. **[**That's why we're increasing our original goal to raise $5,000 by midnight tonight and doubling down on our efforts. name: Herschel Walker
subject: watch before midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191821:J7Bb1j2TN:m:1:3253819041:B616CAD09C8F20A46D52F352A75AD4D1:r)

---
Peter,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[Today, I officially launched my campaign for the United States Senate- and I want to tell you why I am running.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191821:J7Bb1j2TN:m:1:3253819041:B616CAD09C8F20A46D52F352A75AD4D1:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191821:J7Bb1j2TN:m:1:3253819041:B616CAD09C8F20A46D52F352A75AD4D1:r)
From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Peter, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams - just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us - not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191821:J7Bb1j2TN:m:1:3253819041:B616CAD09C8F20A46D52F352A75AD4D1:r) **

Peter, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191821:J7Bb1j2TN:m:1:3253819041:B616CAD09C8F20A46D52F352A75AD4D1:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican for United States Senate

P.S. **[If I can ask you to do one thing today, I hope you'll watch my video.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191821:J7Bb1j2TN:m:1:3253819041:B616CAD09C8F20A46D52F352A75AD4D1:r)**

[** WATCH NOW » **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191821:J7Bb1j2TN:m:1:3253819041:B616CAD09C8F20A46D52F352A75AD4D1:r)

[
](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58191822:J7Bb1j2TN:m:1:3253819041:B616CAD09C8F20A46D52F352A75AD4D1:r)

| | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

name: Jenna Henry,  Keystone Progress
subject: Sen. Corman warns Penn State: Choose Safety or Funding
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082621 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082621]

Dear Friend,

PA State Senator Jake Corman warned Penn State University: If you mandate COVID-19 vaccines, you'll likely lose out on state funding.

To receive this money, the school needs two-thirds of the legislature's votes. Sen. Corman reminds us all that a Republican-dominated General Assembly controls the state's purse strings and, if you fall out of line, it has the political will to cut them.

Yet, if Penn State has an outbreak -- which is more likely if more students are unvaccinated -- many will die.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082621 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082621]

As a resident of State College -- where the university is located -- and as a lifelong constituent of the Corman dynasty, I know firsthand the ways in which poor legislative decisions can harm the well-being of PA’s residents. I'm working with Keystone Progress Education Fund to educate and mobilize voters to elect leaders that we can count on to put our best interests first.

Schools and communities should NOT have to choose between their own safety and their ability to thrive. That's why I'm asking you today to please support us with an urgent donation. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=082621]

Thank you for standing with us,

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress Education Fund
https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

clean_body: [] Dear Friend, PA State Senator Jake Corman warned Penn State University: If you mandate COVID-19 vaccines, you'll likely lose out on state funding. To receive this money, the school needs two-thirds of the legislature's votes. Sen. Corman reminds us all that a Republican-dominated General Assembly controls the state's purse strings and, if you fall out of line, it has the political will to cut them. Yet, if Penn State has an outbreak -- which is more likely if more students are unvaccinated -- many will die. [] As a resident of State College -- where the university is located -- and as a lifelong constituent of the Corman dynasty, I know firsthand the ways in which poor legislative decisions can harm the well-being of PA’s residents. I'm working with Keystone Progress Education Fund to educate and mobilize voters to elect leaders that we can count on to put our best interests first. Schools and communities should NOT have to choose between their own safety and their ability to thrive. That's why I'm asking you today to please support us with an urgent donation. [] Thank you for standing with us, Jenna Henry Keystone Progress Education Fund [] Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees. Joe Biden has failed on so many accounts - where do we even begin?

He gave our enemies all around the World a great and lasting victory when he unexpectedly and inexplicably _removed our great soldiers from Afghanistan_ before taking out our U.S. citizens and allies.

name: Eden, Megan, and Jimena
subject: 2 PACs. 3 women with a dream.
body:
Nice to meet you, Peter! 👋

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34693621/302763787/1300596418?refcode=210826_FR_meettrifectateam_A_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4MWEzYTU1LTdjMDYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4fGN1S1Xo6B7wCFN8qZpV_xI5WUbjLlkf_YPA9B9nXI=)
---
Peter,

At _**Barrier to Entry PAC**_ and _**Pay Your Interns PAC**_ , we pride ourselves in authentically living our values as we work together to build a more equitable, inclusive government -- starting with dismantling socioeconomic barriers to entry into the political space.

Our two sister PACs began as a passion project. Led by a trifecta of three determined young women who share the vision of achieving meaningful social change through lifting up the voices of everyday people, in just 6 months, we have built a community dedicated to making sure working-class people have a seat at the table in Democratic politics.

_**And as a truly scrappy, grassroots movement, your advocacy and support is critical to our success -- which is why we want to make sure you feel like part of the team by personally introducing ourselves to you today!**_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34693622/302763789/1300596418?refcode=210826_FR_meettrifectateam_A_imghead&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4MWEzYTU1LTdjMDYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4fGN1S1Xo6B7wCFN8qZpV_xI5WUbjLlkf_YPA9B9nXI=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34693623/302763791/1300596418?refcode=210826_FR_meettrifectateam_A_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4MWEzYTU1LTdjMDYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4fGN1S1Xo6B7wCFN8qZpV_xI5WUbjLlkf_YPA9B9nXI=)
**Eden McKissick-Hawley, Founder**
After working as a campaign manager and finance director for women running for office, Eden saw the impacts of a system designed to keep working people on the sidelines. Time and time again, she heard the same questions being asked of her candidates by national groups: “How much money can you put into your own campaign?” “How quickly can you quit your job and campaign full time?” “How much money can you raise out of your personal network?” After the 2020 election cycle, she started an organization specifically designed to address systemic issues. Her ultimate goal is to lift up working-class and middle-class change makers rather than discouraging them from being a part of the political system. When Eden is not in a fit of rage over the state of American politics, she can be found making bagels, cooking, and spending time outside.
* * *
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34693624/302763793/1300596418?refcode=210826_FR_meettrifectateam_A_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4MWEzYTU1LTdjMDYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4fGN1S1Xo6B7wCFN8qZpV_xI5WUbjLlkf_YPA9B9nXI=)
**Megan Nien-Yun Clark, Digital Director**
As an advocate for a variety of social causes in her community and a former teacher who saw the effects of socioeconomic inequalities first-hand starting in the education system, Megan returned to grad school to get her Master’s Degree in Digital Communications from Syracuse University with a vision to leverage cause-driven messaging across online platforms. She comes to BTE/PYI from a digital consulting firm that specialized in fundraising for progressive campaigns and nonprofits. Having built comprehensive digital programs for members of Congress, state delegation officials, as well as up-and-coming political outsiders, Megan is excited to continue pursuing her passions for social impact and creative digital strategy with us. In her spare time, Megan loves hanging with her dog Butters, kayaking, hiking, reading, and yoga.
* * *
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34693625/302763796/1300596418?refcode=210826_FR_meettrifectateam_A_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4MWEzYTU1LTdjMDYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4fGN1S1Xo6B7wCFN8qZpV_xI5WUbjLlkf_YPA9B9nXI=)
**Jimena Esparza, Social Media Coordinator**
Jimena worked as a college and career advisor where she saw the massive socioeconomic inequalities that exist in our low-income communities and beyond. With several years of community organizing, Jimena comes to BTE/PYI with the firsthand knowledge of the deep distrust lower-income communities have with our elected officials on either side. Having seen the disconnect between our elected officials and working class communities, Jimena hopes to take part in transforming the system so that more people that look like members of the communities that shape our country can be represented in our election systems. In her spare time, Jimena enjoys hiking, camping, riding her bike, and cuddling with her cats, Walter and Nina.
* * *
**While the three of us might be at the helm of this movement, we know that in order to have a powerful impact, we must continue expanding our team with like-minded, passionate, and talented individuals who reflect our values.**

[**That’s why we’re asking you today to pitch in anything you can to help us recruit volunteers, mobilize supporters, hire more staff, and garner as much grassroots advocacy as we can. Will you rush a contribution right now to help strengthen our movement and support our growing team?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34693627/302763800/1300596418?refcode=210826_FR_meettrifectateam_A_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4MWEzYTU1LTdjMDYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4fGN1S1Xo6B7wCFN8qZpV_xI5WUbjLlkf_YPA9B9nXI=) **______[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34693628/302763801/1300596418?refcode=210826_FR_meettrifectateam_A_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM4MWEzYTU1LTdjMDYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4fGN1S1Xo6B7wCFN8qZpV_xI5WUbjLlkf_YPA9B9nXI=)** Thanks for standing with us! **_Eden, Megan, and Jimena_**

clean_body: Nice to meet you, Peter! 👋 | | | = Peter, At Barrier to Entry PAC and Pay Your Interns PAC , we pride ourselves in authentically living our values as we work together to build a more equitable, inclusive government -- starting with dismantling socioeconomic barriers to entry into the political space. Our two sister PACs began as a passion project. Led by a trifecta of three determined young women who share the vision of achieving meaningful social change through lifting up the voices of everyday people, in just 6 months, we have built a community dedicated to making sure working-class people have a seat at the table in Democratic politics. And as a truly scrappy, grassroots movement, your advocacy and support is critical to our success -- which is why we want to make sure you feel like part of the team by personally introducing ourselves to you today! = = Eden McKissick-Hawley, Founder After working as a campaign manager and finance director for women running for office, Eden saw the impacts of a system designed to keep working people on the sidelines. Time and time again, she heard the same questions being asked of her candidates by national groups: “How much money can you put into your own campaign?” “How quickly can you quit your job and campaign full time?” “How much money can you raise out of your personal network?” After the 2020 election cycle, she started an organization specifically designed to address systemic issues. Her ultimate goal is to lift up working-class and middle-class change makers rather than discouraging them from being a part of the political system. When Eden is not in a fit of rage over the state of American politics, she can be found making bagels, cooking, and spending time outside. = Megan Nien-Yun Clark, Digital Director As an advocate for a variety of social causes in her community and a former teacher who saw the effects of socioeconomic inequalities first-hand starting in the education system, Megan returned to grad school to get her Master’s Degree in Digital Communications from Syracuse University with a vision to leverage cause-driven messaging across online platforms. She comes to BTE/PYI from a digital consulting firm that specialized in fundraising for progressive campaigns and nonprofits. Having built comprehensive digital programs for members of Congress, state delegation officials, as well as up-and-coming political outsiders, Megan is excited to continue pursuing her passions for social impact and creative digital strategy with us. In her spare time, Megan loves hanging with her dog Butters, kayaking, hiking, reading, and yoga. = Jimena Esparza, Social Media Coordinator Jimena worked as a college and career advisor where she saw the massive socioeconomic inequalities that exist in our low-income communities and beyond. With several years of community organizing, Jimena comes to BTE/PYI with the firsthand knowledge of the deep distrust lower-income communities have with our elected officials on either side. Having seen the disconnect between our elected officials and working class communities, Jimena hopes to take part in transforming the system so that more people that look like members of the communities that shape our country can be represented in our election systems. In her spare time, Jimena enjoys hiking, camping, riding her bike, and cuddling with her cats, Walter and Nina. While the three of us might be at the helm of this movement, we know that in order to have a powerful impact, we must continue expanding our team with like-minded, passionate, and talented individuals who reflect our values. = ____= Thanks for standing with us! Eden, Megan, and Jimena ************ ********** ****************EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier to Entry PAC**************** ****************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** ---|---|---|--- BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We provide direct cash assistance for essential items like phones, cars, laptops, and living stipends -- which often times, these candidates and their campaigns don't have access to. We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space. Pitch in today to help provide necessary support and resources for working class candidates today! >> __= | || || Barrier To Entry PAC PO Box 6623 Cleveland, OH 44101 United States | |

Friend,

Earlier this month I announced our campaign for the U.S. Senate, and since then, I've heard from _so many of you_ who are ready for new energy and honest leadership.

But we've also heard from the Republicans -- they immediately went on the attack online, and even tried new dirty tricks to spread outrageous lies about me and my family.

The other side is terrified to run against our campaign. We know they'll stop at nothing to try to tear us down, so we need to be ready for whatever comes next. Look, before this campaign gets even more intense, here's my message to you:

Remember that you're on the team that has always been about doing what's right and fighting for everyone -- not wealthy special interests. You're part of the campaign that remains focused on the issues that matter to working families: good jobs, affordable health care, the right to join a union, and a democracy and economy that works for all Americans.

The Republicans are going to keep telling lies, but you and I are going to keep telling the truth.

_And I need your help to do it._

**[Can I count on you to chip in whatever works for you to become a Founding Donor before our campaign's first end-of-month fundraising deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34694612/302768728/1374837556?refcode=em21_210826_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjU0MGU0Zi03ZTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oXpJG4QUuwF86su8t3b07m0P0xp6sTIATNpNEYjXbbM=)**

I've defeated three Republicans in battleground elections in the last three years without taking any money from corporate PACs. Each time, we won because people like you chipped in what you can, when you can.

**[Let's do it a fourth time, friend. Please, chip in any amount you can before next Tuesday's end-of-month deadline to become a Founding Donor and help us build a strong grassroots campaign that will flip this Senate seat blue and deliver results for working families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34694619/302768738/1374837556?refcode=em21_210826_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjU0MGU0Zi03ZTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oXpJG4QUuwF86su8t3b07m0P0xp6sTIATNpNEYjXbbM=)**

Thank you,

Conor Lamb [MAKE A MONTHLY DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34694621/302768740/1374837556?refcode=em21_210826_eom1&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjU0MGU0Zi03ZTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oXpJG4QUuwF86su8t3b07m0P0xp6sTIATNpNEYjXbbM=) [DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34694623/302768742/1374837556?refcode=em21_210826_eom1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjU0MGU0Zi03ZTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oXpJG4QUuwF86su8t3b07m0P0xp6sTIATNpNEYjXbbM=)

name: NextGen America
subject: Let us know: How is the Child Tax Credit helping your family?
body:
We want to hear from you!

| | | The Child Tax Credit is providing much-needed relief to millions of households. How has it helped your family?
---
| [Take our survey](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34694675/302768801/929397340?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzU0MGU0Zi03ZTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EST9KP-S2bmVmLYCa6532zWt3rd24VLu1shsNDl7XNk=&emci=3e844d6e-b705-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=2c540e4f-7e06-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
**This month, the second round of monthly payments from the newly-expanded Child Tax Credit made their way to millions of working families. **
Our efforts to elect President Biden and a Democratic majority in Congress resulted in the passage of the American Rescue Plan — and with it the Child Tax Credit expansion — despite zero votes from Republican lawmakers.
**Now, with these payments, working families can breathe knowing they have room to cover expenses and pay the bills.**
If you’re a parent or caregiver, here’s what you need to know about the Child Tax Credit:
* The Child Tax Credit is being delivered in**six monthly payments this year to an estimated 35 million families, covering nearly 60 million children.**
* The monthly payments total up to **$300 for each child under six** and up to **$250 for each child ages six to 17.**
* **The payments will go out around the 15 of every month**, starting in July and ending in December.
* **To be eligible for the child tax credit,** the child you are claiming the credit for must be under the age of 18.
* If you filed an income tax return in either 2019 or 2020, or you signed up to get an Economic Impact Payment last year, **you automatically received the first monthly payment.**
* **You don’t have to do anything to get your credit** — it will be automatically deposited into your bank account or mailed as a check.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34694676/302768802/-1396201488?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzU0MGU0Zi03ZTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EST9KP-S2bmVmLYCa6532zWt3rd24VLu1shsNDl7XNk=&emci=3e844d6e-b705-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=2c540e4f-7e06-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34694678/302768803/-1396201488?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzU0MGU0Zi03ZTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EST9KP-S2bmVmLYCa6532zWt3rd24VLu1shsNDl7XNk=&emci=3e844d6e-b705-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=2c540e4f-7e06-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172)
This new program will mean a lot to individual families across America — and to our country as a whole. New data suggests **the Child Tax Credit could cut childhood poverty in half.**
[We want to hear from you: Take our survey to let us know how the expanded Child Tax Credit has helped your family and show Congress that these payments need to be permanent. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34694685/302768804/-636686601?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzU0MGU0Zi03ZTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EST9KP-S2bmVmLYCa6532zWt3rd24VLu1shsNDl7XNk=&emci=3e844d6e-b705-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=2c540e4f-7e06-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172)
**The change that you all worked for in 2020 is happening right now.** Before the first of the newly-expanded Child Tax Credit check was sent out on July 15, 11 percent of families reported that they were experiencing food insecurity.**After the first check went out, that rate dropped to eight percent of families. **
As our country continues to recover from COVID-19, President Biden and Democrats in Congress have made real progress in reducing the weight on families’ shoulders through the American Rescue Plan and the Child Tax Credit.
These payments are aiding in the fight against food insecurity, helping families recover during a time of historic challenges, and dramatically decreasing child poverty. **The next step is to continue them into 2022 and beyond. **
Senate Democrats have already proposed to extend the Child Tax Credit for five years through their $3.5 trillion budget proposal.
[The work you’ve done is changing our country for the better, and you can keep it going. Take our survey now to build momentum for a long-term extension of the Child Tax Credit.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34694687/302768807/169882453?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzU0MGU0Zi03ZTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EST9KP-S2bmVmLYCa6532zWt3rd24VLu1shsNDl7XNk=&emci=3e844d6e-b705-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=2c540e4f-7e06-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=6787172)
Thank you,
NextGen America
**P.S. Do you know a parent or caregiver with questions about the child tax credit? Forward this email to give them all the information they need!**
| **NextGen America**
268 Bush St. #2919

clean_body: We want to hear from you! | | | The Child Tax Credit is providing much-needed relief to millions of households. How has it helped your family? | | | Friend, This month, the second round of monthly payments from the newly-expanded Child Tax Credit made their way to millions of working families. Our efforts to elect President Biden and a Democratic majority in Congress resulted in the passage of the American Rescue Plan — and with it the Child Tax Credit expansion — despite zero votes from Republican lawmakers. Now, with these payments, working families can breathe knowing they have room to cover expenses and pay the bills. If you’re a parent or caregiver, here’s what you need to know about the Child Tax Credit: The Child Tax Credit is being delivered insix monthly payments this year to an estimated 35 million families, covering nearly 60 million children. The monthly payments total up to $300 for each child under six and up to $250 for each child ages six to 17. The payments will go out around the 15 of every month, starting in July and ending in December. To be eligible for the child tax credit, the child you are claiming the credit for must be under the age of 18. If you filed an income tax return in either 2019 or 2020, or you signed up to get an Economic Impact Payment last year, you automatically received the first monthly payment. You don’t have to do anything to get your credit — it will be automatically deposited into your bank account or mailed as a check. This new program will mean a lot to individual families across America — and to our country as a whole. New data suggests the Child Tax Credit could cut childhood poverty in half. The change that you all worked for in 2020 is happening right now. Before the first of the newly-expanded Child Tax Credit check was sent out on July 15, 11 percent of families reported that they were experiencing food insecurity.After the first check went out, that rate dropped to eight percent of families. As our country continues to recover from COVID-19, President Biden and Democrats in Congress have made real progress in reducing the weight on families’ shoulders through the American Rescue Plan and the Child Tax Credit. These payments are aiding in the fight against food insecurity, helping families recover during a time of historic challenges, and dramatically decreasing child poverty. The next step is to continue them into 2022 and beyond. Senate Democrats have already proposed to extend the Child Tax Credit for five years through their $3.5 trillion budget proposal. Thank you, NextGen America P.S. Do you know a parent or caregiver with questions about the child tax credit? Forward this email to give them all the information they need! | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 PaThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =
