On January 6th, 2021, violent insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol, putting a bedrock principle of our democracy -- the peaceful transfer of power -- at risk. They were inspired by Donald Trump’s lies and egged on by extremists like Ted Cruz.

Despite the tragic outcome, Republicans keep doubling down on Trump’s anti-democratic lies.

_That’s what makes the January 6 Commission so important. We have to understand why the insurrection happened so we can stop one from ever happening again._

**[With Virginia Republicans like Glenn Youngkin doubling down on Trump’s lies with so-called “election integrity rallies,” we want to know -- do you support the work of the January 6 Commission?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8LDAih397-DZRKYd0H3kLpfUJ2frgmbNEJhihXQKEKDSo9G_MXqxPso2QEeO-3zdaH2XmUpmZFRxnP7kc9j9xTfNUVdGxV3P81afQcdHiHoY52RSIfvI4jPSJdVmJbvWGWPVwAKzHjUoN1BfPhFLHh4KMxVEACpfeDd6DchtlQtbtbJZVeFkongtwaQCvlJ9y75Xno5n2KLkHCCInrxu9aNQuSh9uKi92Pv2TrE2ihjo/3es/NwHpEYqcRu2u8JEYYqtn6w/h1/4bbkoQkCb-9ZGgCAoZKdOjL6z2tXvreV9sK-6D7YJPI)** **[ YES ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8LDAih397-DZRKYd0H3kLpStR9R-0DQZ3pk8ALP53heiIkXRGYPJLX7yCefW90vsuHaigReU-ypFRCxLMl9phSa0Q004iub8FvJVmHVQ8huCu7wGDYI47rKsGxgfv3ltsfngZ1CFOUPisbybYejNY-zKPajlzQKhxlh2wnlCUv4-Ur4FZ_PrgEo4j_iVvi0QQfQh_TMn_FRmgQ-V5wfiD9GsycWVqZ9Aecz2U79KZ9zw/3es/NwHpEYqcRu2u8JEYYqtn6w/h2/baBn04KHtKLtRQC07iZmnvCgsBquU9CkdRW_3E6vcaE)
[ NO ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkf3VLciM-Z8uNbg2tzVUP8LDAih397-DZRKYd0H3kLpfjnTZKaqfr5qUUFJwBeC5XD4iOpFlaKDR-BWQzIuIUtwd1YAnAAnGEe9RRtXsVIrFkZiPUcF6hR1EPJexBUHvozp-t1Jdeb0ajABvW-jQDfOJxPK35OU1WyTh6Al9gLm2Ld3CfW6yS_zn9mZzkxYOnjSozYWxfNMDtgxOH5PA9QwblzokzQWZRLmNii4yONh0o0ajfPIXACJ2tY5tlVzCo/3es/NwHpEYqcRu2u8JEYYqtn6w/h3/zZwa_rGK000akRd9a3HMGShFYTMjoo1uFZkMTp2KoEQ) ** Republicans across the country continue to sabotage our elections. In state after state, they are introducing racist voter suppression bills to stop people from voting. Now, Trump-endorsed Glenn Youngkin wants to bring those same anti-democratic laws to Virginia.

We can’t let guys like Glenn Youngkin get away with taking away our freedom to vote. The January 6 Commission is a huge opportunity to hold them accountable.

name: Joe Biden Impeachment Committee
subject: MTG Impeaches Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene
body:
Peter --
JOE BIDEN MUST BE IMPEACHED.
Not tomorrow. Not next week. Not next year.

NOW . . . before it is too late!

SIGN YOUR IMPEACH JOE BIDEN PETITION RIGHT
AWAY
After you sign, I'm asking you to please
consider going the extra mile by chipping in $100, $50, $25, $15
-- whatever you can most afford -- to help me "Impeach Joe Biden"
and help me build momentum across America to IMPEACH JOE BIDEN.
Joe Biden refuses to resign.
Republicans must impeach him before China Joe
can do any more damage to America.
SIGN YOUR IMPEACH JOE BIDEN PETITION RIGHT
AWAY
There is no time to delay.
We must move swiftly to ensure that Joe Biden
can no longer hurt our country and destroy it piece by piece.
The case against Joe Biden in STRONG.
Consider President Biden's:

Dereliction of duty in Afghanistan; and
Violations of immigration law that has
caused a national security crisis on our Southern border;

In seven short months, Joe Biden has caused
America to lose the respect of the entire world.
The evidence is clear and his actions are so
egregious that he must be impeached.
Joe Biden DISHONORED the sacrifices made by
every American soldier who fought in the 20-year war, especially
those who gave their life for the cause.
Joe Biden LEFT BEHIND over 10,000 American
citizens to face the terrifying rule of the Taliban as they
impose Sharia law across the country.
No commander-in-chief should ever leave
Americans behind!
Joe Biden (along with Kamala Harris) VIOLATED
our immigration laws, deprived our Border Patrol of manpower and
resources, and created a national security crisis by allowing
unknown foreign nationals into our country who wish to do harm to
Americans.
That is why I am drafting Articles of
Impeachment against President Joe Biden.
Will you become a Citizen CoSponsor to urge
your Representatives and Senators to get on board?
The Taliban have made a fool of Joe Biden.

America's southern border is being overrun
with hordes of illegal aliens.
Our economy is crippled because of the
Chinese Covid bioweapon.
The world is laughing at us and Joe Biden has
fled into hiding!
China Joe must go.
75 million Americans are fed up with
inaction.
Will you join and become a citizen
co-sponsor?

I need you to join this fight: become a
Citizen Co-Sponsor by signing your "Impeach Joe Biden" petition!
After you sign, I'm asking you to please
consider going the extra mile by chipping in $100, $50, $25, $15
-- whatever you can most afford -- to the "Impeach Joe Biden
Fund" and help me build momentum across America to IMPEACH JOE
BIDEN.
The Biden Crime Family must be held
accountable.
So please, after you become a citizen
co-sponsor to impeach Joe Biden, consider donating before the
deadline.
I'll keep you updated.

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Greene
for Congress

name: Ralph Northam
subject: The difference between Glenn and Terry:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34696378/302776268/-2023814932?refcode=20210826.4_RN_8DS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTk0ZmM5ZC04MDA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8orn1WzYoJ4FnFKRg-MYvDr7BprBKSU_ScgcfW1ihVg=)

| | Derek, the difference between Terry McAuliffe and Glenn Youngkin could not be more stark.

[**_I’ll tell you why their differences matter, but first, will you make a contribution to Terry’s campaign? He has a critical filing deadline coming up and he needs your contribution to reach his goal._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34696379/302776269/1097049879?refcode=20210826.4_RN_8DS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTk0ZmM5ZC04MDA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8orn1WzYoJ4FnFKRg-MYvDr7BprBKSU_ScgcfW1ihVg=)

Glenn Youngkin wants us to believe that Virginia’s economy is in a ditch — and that only _he_ can give us back a “rip roaring” economy.

But Terry knows that **Virginia is the best state in the United States for business,** and our unemployment rate is well below the national average.

Glenn Youngkin wants to enact failed tax policies that have been proven to destroy economies.

Terry wants to build on the **successful economy** we already have to keep Virginia on the right track.

Glenn Youngkin wants to follow the lead of failed Florida Governor Ron DeSantis in ignoring the threat of COVID, leading schools to close.

But Terry knows we’ll need a **strong leader** to pull us out of this pandemic.

**And above all, Glenn Youngkin is a far-right culture warrior who wants to take Virginia backwards, while Terry McAuliffe is a proven leader with a bold vision to move Virginia forward.**

[**_The choice couldn’t be clearer, Derek. clean_body: | | | = | | Derek, the difference between Terry McAuliffe and Glenn Youngkin could not be more stark. = Glenn Youngkin wants us to believe that Virginia’s economy is in a ditch — and that only he can give us back a “rip roaring” economy. But Terry knows that Virginia is the best state in the United States for business, and our unemployment rate is well below the national average. Glenn Youngkin wants to enact failed tax policies that have been proven to destroy economies. Terry wants to build on the successful economy we already have to keep Virginia on the right track. Glenn Youngkin wants to follow the lead of failed Florida Governor Ron DeSantis in ignoring the threat of COVID, leading schools to close. But Terry knows we’ll need a strong leader to pull us out of this pandemic. And above all, Glenn Youngkin is a far-right culture warrior who wants to take Virginia backwards, while Terry McAuliffe is a proven leader with a bold vision to move Virginia forward. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Ralph Northam = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

Hi, Peter!
It has been a whirlwind few days since our campaign announcement, but I am so honored by the outpouring of support I've received from across the state. From Memphis to Chattanooga to the Tri-Cities, I talked to voters who are fired up and ready to make changes.
I wanted to let you know about our kickoff fundraiser that we have coming up on September 14th in Nashville. I don't have millions of my own dollars to spend on this race like Bill Lee and I also don't have a bunch of special interest friends that are going to fund the campaign with dark money-- and that isn't a complaint! Luckily, I have some wonderful friends who are hosting our kickoff fundraiser and if you're able, I hope you will join.
The details are below and you can click here to join our host committee or buy a ticket. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jasonmartinsept]
Thanks so much for your support in this endeavor, together we can make Tennessee a state where everyone can thrive!
Jason

* * *
**_— Begin Forwarded Message —_**

If you need anymore evidence of why we need bold, progressive Democrats in Congress, take a look at the barrage of headlines coming out of Washington:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34697283/302779902/1601473053?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210826_1_2&refcode2=10bd0417-8406-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGJkMDQxNy04NDA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ei_KYM3oNqL71BLfAQ9y0jD44gNmeQ0VF48MRqjXTvo=)
So-called ‘centrist’ Democrats used their influence in Congress to slow down the budget reconciliation blueprint. While the budget has passed in the House, these Democrats put up a strong fight against voting on popular policies.

This budget would include new investments in paid family leave, Medicare, and child care — not to mention investments in the fight against the climate crisis. It includes policies that President Biden ran on and won back the White House with. _The same policies that are supported by millions of hard-working Wisconsinites._

Thank you, Patty As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. * PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Latinos were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Latino,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, **a proud Latina Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=52d1020ad85f42ed897ea9fe093def05&_e=il2trkQ9ttt1MtKuuK5IX1zh-sro0vffstka_nEG8iJzHgeYARtZLdWvq4vPYOH_f0yzbADlMpJKFI2-xy2TVUenLiORGYrE9ix_DI9iIvQeTtIlzolBkR9wmu6VfUnj7yX3txbPtf7OKYSLeIa8M8symBkGGv1Lv0EJYmyPCObBJ1aa1KsAUYt4vli0RmDQts5EMeFZgalk3_qvUY8R9By171y5clDtucHSAXj_qASmK7SOnzIEuq6xBv3LYrL1G8qAf7JeMXEQkLAc7IzhgOInTf7fEDeIM5DBxqFaFVHIZcsBobk6b2m1_kB39gBqmn01bj7TUY023xHI1O1Ush_psq0xeIg1AjmKpZ87gnMFAJxWcznWiKdt9lI_85t7gDG7pYHxa7FG1hYE2fYMO_yYU0bI64PEvW8ORP0C-yMehRFJbwP4itmk2zR07wRHw8n4kszYgntfllbBVprtE3wOoE1Mi-2QjVUZW-CyiU6ZVijmAT5hotX83QqOKjwq)

I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Latinos?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=52d1020ad85f42ed897ea9fe093def05&_e=il2trkQ9ttt1MtKuuK5IX1zh-sro0vffstka_nEG8iJzHgeYARtZLdWvq4vPYOH_f0yzbADlMpJKFI2-xy2TVUenLiORGYrE9ix_DI9iIvQeTtIlzolBkR9wmu6VfUnj7yX3txbPtf7OKYSLeIa8M8symBkGGv1Lv0EJYmyPCObBJ1aa1KsAUYt4vli0RmDQts5EMeFZgalk3_qvUY8R9By171y5clDtucHSAXj_qASmK7SOnzIEuq6xBv3LYrL1G8qAf7JeMXEQkLAc7IzhgJ8P5RC8JZiIrh_gxQg5HIqdea9fMmYSrlQ1EcA8lqaH2j47Bc5ivwVi-bLYXV4QF_tEss9Zpe0yaBrrK9miM9imqNLBm7EdmXfpekWa9mmB0zWn_mSGUWj8-OmTRXyzbWCYr8fnWQVU-FvbaoYxmAqlwoor_aQLLS_k5_4Eb9wc-T_phqg75Ws-9A4Rw_RRPZd0WP3JAN91QaN8MjYU2TWe0HXMTw3d2j35fHg81szh)

Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=52d1020ad85f42ed897ea9fe093def05&_e=il2trkQ9ttt1MtKuuK5IX1zh-sro0vffstka_nEG8iJzHgeYARtZLdWvq4vPYOH_f0yzbADlMpJKFI2-xy2TVUenLiORGYrE9ix_DI9iIvQeTtIlzolBkR9wmu6VfUnj7yX3txbPtf7OKYSLeIa8M8symBkGGv1Lv0EJYmyPCObBJ1aa1KsAUYt4vli0RmDQts5EMeFZgalk3_qvUY8R9By171y5clDtucHSAXj_qASmK7SOnzIEuq6xBv3LYrL1G8qAf7JeMXEQkLAc7IzhgHufnFlH8ZeBvnfp0IY-j3POsIr8qPO8PaCutRnblvMC3vWC1QhfkJTEjOXaVMrP2PIaQTE641IzIoObY-eWBFfxwFBYs7jVC4RRuP7gNY_JcNwGfwrQnRpBRLL5fo4Umk71ddtFeWk_RYGCu9oWrH66ZyACIVbuxqEiPlyJIGBh88dsbRCuoc_VnoKFme807bJckgNB920e1SMigq5QjsWrhXEOb2c9VzQiU5FS3uAM)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
Republican for Congress

body:
A terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f8480dbb12cb41dfadb8ca6b79b4dd49&_e=AG6eXqn_gZx9KFZxtCdSvT3kcHz9DxZrgvuqg2MGPKJk1Zm6RyNl0QbqSrXCP-7_gL2BEO7wgObrZYuWGa93kGtky71kQPmeuLU_G26i3dQIz-xJC0wXiRQmBPNOSqmM8CDmRI33Jmc4d59Yc8QpOb-4SrTwuVYarMhUPNMcj99dQOMIgoZFL-Q5nIlK_d5d0Y-74MTOC1bE9dPC4QvVbUKOmG1GhyfBJRS-_KcExRRUc_qgQHwIbeV6pgBOBXjSzVAxqzIonkdnNbF8BDbH0kazB4q8JuxpNHwdN6CQYwttS9vpOhJ-6R-psa9N9QtrECdsbCB3ieAupnlF4bZqkh9gClrABJg7dvGAHQ2_kEEGpXqTqFG-nn56bsCzDfRBcPZrg6nSoT4OBBQkrpIVio8YDhsDRTIX5E5cXnqsDYZ5Jr26jx-Z53wp1Jh1MdJimXcv6Fb80AlolchafvcI8w%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f8480dbb12cb41dfadb8ca6b79b4dd49&_e=AG6eXqn_gZx9KFZxtCdSvT3kcHz9DxZrgvuqg2MGPKJk1Zm6RyNl0QbqSrXCP-7_gL2BEO7wgObrZYuWGa93kGtky71kQPmeuLU_G26i3dQIz-xJC0wXiRQmBPNOSqmM8CDmRI33Jmc4d59Yc8QpOb-4SrTwuVYarMhUPNMcj99dQOMIgoZFL-Q5nIlK_d5d0Y-74MTOC1bE9dPC4QvVbUKOmG1GhyfBJRS-_KcExRRUc_qgQHwIbeV6pgBOBXjSI6zfr_owJHb5paTtevryaqtmeREIha_-PRyccqDh7CQK1dTLiKSlI9hw9Pa0Zql4KPxliF5Hz3U3mLJNXnpgAJsbnysF8OsF1AnjOaMBiOlNEsoiCDXrfTW-RS34HXG635CxNsVh0ONxFW3T0oUVuIBflEmcgLVatxjIVnKgXLEOSWHDCazWq_YKbOgKM3KAj0bMwMrTEqaNNEAIXCeudg%3D%3D)
I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f8480dbb12cb41dfadb8ca6b79b4dd49&_e=AG6eXqn_gZx9KFZxtCdSvT3kcHz9DxZrgvuqg2MGPKJk1Zm6RyNl0QbqSrXCP-7_gL2BEO7wgObrZYuWGa93kGtky71kQPmeuLU_G26i3dQIz-xJC0wXiRQmBPNOSqmM8CDmRI33Jmc4d59Yc8QpOb-4SrTwuVYarMhUPNMcj99dQOMIgoZFL-Q5nIlK_d5d0Y-74MTOC1bE9dPC4QvVbUKOmG1GhyfBJRS-_KcExRRUc_qgQHwIbeV6pgBOBXjSDUepFTtl2K-AMQe5WUnTK_n8qFCvkNdsRuovOF71SnSqbgylmFCMcYNkqpeupIRct-nStbaMHeq8xiYGzFiKUlqe1Ed53ADaQURUOQvVi3dUEBGvuAbTCQtEYa5mKaD0kax-e0J6sZwF0IjhXxcTof06EPbxhjYYKf7kwSB8rfKDwwxX3BAE0tMMYpUXLWfYJobRD7Y1D3aZ6sxy6GRtRg%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f8480dbb12cb41dfadb8ca6b79b4dd49&_e=AG6eXqn_gZx9KFZxtCdSvT3kcHz9DxZrgvuqg2MGPKJk1Zm6RyNl0QbqSrXCP-7_gL2BEO7wgObrZYuWGa93kGtky71kQPmeuLU_G26i3dQIz-xJC0wXiRQmBPNOSqmM8CDmRI33Jmc4d59Yc8QpOb-4SrTwuVYarMhUPNMcj99dQOMIgoZFL-Q5nIlK_d5d0Y-74MTOC1bE9dPC4QvVbUKOmG1GhyfBJRS-_KcExRRUc_qgQHwIbeV6pgBOBXjSK_jvmjxkpJVlAD034sEbZhoqP0OCxmXXXvk53wwjzTXNNFj0S1RHh_J8dDKyFii6vb7ucxHPbOWu7uWuxk-pH7dbq94_l_6H9Hg8qXSmhb7TajlHGGzHr6HbdWB6Nmqm_nIhWWBUqFpmdro-Dj5hGql88D2RCXUiWYh7Q1nL3hl8Cqymcpr7CCHxJaaq5_XAUP6M4eznFVmgH5T9F53WGg%3D%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f8480dbb12cb41dfadb8ca6b79b4dd49&_e=AG6eXqn_gZx9KFZxtCdSvT3kcHz9DxZrgvuqg2MGPKJk1Zm6RyNl0QbqSrXCP-7_gL2BEO7wgObrZYuWGa93kGtky71kQPmeuLU_G26i3dQIz-xJC0wXiRQmBPNOSqmM8CDmRI33Jmc4d59Yc8QpOb-4SrTwuVYarMhUPNMcj99dQOMIgoZFL-Q5nIlK_d5d0Y-74MTOC1bE9dPC4QvVbUKOmG1GhyfBJRS-_KcExRRUc_qgQHwIbeV6pgBOBXjS26Qc27YyHt0Ow2Xd4ZA5rCf3wy_SwR2voyX9SWqzuNzBJPZaX2C-KRH-9xcgAYDHFTbRC5976xZiGATzpXH9e_aqRXudmPEZWmZbh8Y0ie9sJbAw-d_rsmQvjcfXZmleAy9dboTwgBy3K4sYVulcAc5QtL6uslKWiQ8HmK9ZJYNc5oJrJlnZqzI0f3xJUwGHlF1EawZGEvVJiPbli0Ultw%3D%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $6 - to mark my sixth anniversary of thwarting a terrorist attack?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f8480dbb12cb41dfadb8ca6b79b4dd49&_e=AG6eXqn_gZx9KFZxtCdSvT3kcHz9DxZrgvuqg2MGPKJk1Zm6RyNl0QbqSrXCP-7_gL2BEO7wgObrZYuWGa93kGtky71kQPmeuLU_G26i3dQIz-xJC0wXiRQmBPNOSqmM8CDmRI33Jmc4d59Yc8QpOb-4SrTwuVYarMhUPNMcj99dQOMIgoZFL-Q5nIlK_d5d0Y-74MTOC1bE9dPC4QvVbUKOmG1GhyfBJRS-_KcExRRUc_qgQHwIbeV6pgBOBXjSMtHHVaD3mfM2X7EH3kkQMB1IhzKZCP8KNJ3lhTyj1xW3paoIfDWMkWx1e6JdhVxrVTxl1tOa7-BRRXfTnXpmi9QejV1n177BJUjXUsw8SRCn523VskCD0XHv9fO-m9VTpkoJ8rv0CuaE-rqrWjrN29mR3CUWcJu-aEN2agR7JJbbST1L4vzi77EQVPSRE0ycTHw_rUZXazOAyB4kxKJ_AQ%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f8480dbb12cb41dfadb8ca6b79b4dd49&_e=AG6eXqn_gZx9KFZxtCdSvT3kcHz9DxZrgvuqg2MGPKJk1Zm6RyNl0QbqSrXCP-7_gL2BEO7wgObrZYuWGa93kGtky71kQPmeuLU_G26i3dQIz-xJC0wXiRQmBPNOSqmM8CDmRI33Jmc4d59Yc8QpOb-4SrTwuVYarMhUPNMcj99dQOMIgoZFL-Q5nIlK_d5d0Y-74MTOC1bE9dPC4QvVbUKOmG1GhyfBJRS-_KcExRRUc_qgQHwIbeV6pgBOBXjSR_BwkKa3KwS8my8ENfokccacCgoe_gI0ulO98jvxcua6gFauwycJDd4Z2OnT1q6VM228-Kpu9XDlXl-nNJh7IgK38ev0MMpZWWAK2yJ6C1edXSH_hpT9DapNp8C9PQutcabfpp5Fmblz8xybGxN6j44qgQSf24rkHncihdb1xQByfpUhIWcJIpWg5V047TV24-do5GbCUFidkwoluziAHw%3D%3D)

Thank you very much,

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Vaccine Mandate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, OR let the government enforce mandates? . Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=fb29d9acca134c469486b3fd51308f83&_t=pNZ_YA8Orypul_df8vtunDZDVK5pmnrcjLI3C340hAd4bVpXLQGY9eosjrmLnp5Fa1biMsgNfxzgpCc6pjE1QFFKwC5Ylrmx8fHeT5z_VHpyRFVYl1fSRduh0k7JLpeud1lP5Noa5vhurNVlIkKWUiHdzE_PbyYX2FS2QfM19EA%3D)

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fb29d9acca134c469486b3fd51308f83&_e=fdcCN9_BN7AsfDVpEEzpUvxQex88sf2-VaGhWgudtkW4LhEe0Jx3E4wK01Z8SFgWK_trGLj9bTQebinNSX1g9lAbdv_iSshtywCSZmqGawmzI3VX55hqqgyBEFJvTQD5zZmQRI9UUXX5JEngIUo0Mg00a8-PSWooh6rDig1T0l9MUC0ImaHRkHUtdElGhZdfMgyFNIHF_kHLGmeq6M-Ru-09xw1GRQ4pf6pjfBWJJsVTXXgs67QHPNzEc_jOLPKTiNmcRVE2Mt6DvkhdToLkCANE67gJ4jTSVU6F12jXOyiegrNcD6mNbA-Qwuvo7W2ns_pkrLUQr2aLIoDH7wqi5AfaJC--E8DMVHUEvgG61IMJgfKrAYd8uYpM2rcGiXjDyMFBGu-Vk6_x6LILfQAKsJ0dg8CnOiw8o2bwCYJAup_92QFZ0NLIUDWt4EWRr8wV14mvIPbzRZv1ZkKdhZ74nVJT86jbIRovcLZFhBN6Hj7SErLezvChEkWPVsbsYn4KQL8kJvcWwnNPl-GsmQ7sVw%3D%3D)
---

Fellow American,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fb29d9acca134c469486b3fd51308f83&_e=fdcCN9_BN7AsfDVpEEzpUvxQex88sf2-VaGhWgudtkW4LhEe0Jx3E4wK01Z8SFgWK_trGLj9bTQebinNSX1g9lAbdv_iSshtywCSZmqGawmzI3VX55hqqgyBEFJvTQD5zZmQRI9UUXX5JEngIUo0Mg00a8-PSWooh6rDig1T0l9MUC0ImaHRkHUtdElGhZdfMgyFNIHF_kHLGmeq6M-Ru-09xw1GRQ4pf6pjfBWJJsVTXXgs67QHPNzEc_jOLPKTiNmcRVE2Mt6DvkhdToLkCANE67gJ4jTSVU6F12jXOyiegrNcD6mNbA-Qwuvo7W2nVlP5yNFBMqIt5VD6BmVgb_v2ialWr9FFdCMr6eAW171j97yfOwSnW9Lon6Zhsy4oUGjRkYiyuzW1FQYSE807-Zm92Qu6fZqxuP6YHvcKpldBib0aAT08RSKfuyB8FqlYpFq2GI6-doYfJCmv-cCkBqe2ptUN5crI0vzrA_R7EkOe7HSputxv5WUez6VZynfiGAFa_yPuAhKEnWlxESQM9g%3D%3D)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fb29d9acca134c469486b3fd51308f83&_e=fdcCN9_BN7AsfDVpEEzpUvxQex88sf2-VaGhWgudtkW4LhEe0Jx3E4wK01Z8SFgWK_trGLj9bTQebinNSX1g9lAbdv_iSshtywCSZmqGawmzI3VX55hqqgyBEFJvTQD5zZmQRI9UUXX5JEngIUo0Mg00a8-PSWooh6rDig1T0l9MUC0ImaHRkHUtdElGhZdfMgyFNIHF_kHLGmeq6M-Ru-09xw1GRQ4pf6pjfBWJJsVTXXgs67QHPNzEc_jOLPKTiNmcRVE2Mt6DvkhdToLkCANE67gJ4jTSVU6F12jXOyiegrNcD6mNbA-Qwuvo7W2nSzCjjMzAVOGsDQ2M1pwyuSTX-Gv1k_J3axnouLBjzVfooPtQoCkDLNoiD3bH7Z24LhqjSOIvIL0elzh4STKTlc2dQo07dqXoreU6FPnULgt7mmmKlfgHsHcZ5x9ogb5yWV2faEUC5OncKqFG4lOA3RTFzy8ciXr5zAkI2XOOevypqB88SqBicq3yJXtxPRLvrV6I7ZqQduITgg9uVZVosA%3D%3D)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, August 17TH

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=fb29d9acca134c469486b3fd51308f83&_e=fdcCN9_BN7AsfDVpEEzpUvxQex88sf2-VaGhWgudtkW4LhEe0Jx3E4wK01Z8SFgWK_trGLj9bTQebinNSX1g9lAbdv_iSshtywCSZmqGawmzI3VX55hqqgyBEFJvTQD5zZmQRI9UUXX5JEngIUo0Mg00a8-PSWooh6rDig1T0l9MUC0ImaHRkHUtdElGhZdfMgyFNIHF_kHLGmeq6M-Ru-09xw1GRQ4pf6pjfBWJJsVTXXgs67QHPNzEc_jOLPKTiNmcRVE2Mt6DvkhdToLkCANE67gJ4jTSVU6F12jXOyiegrNcD6mNbA-Qwuvo7W2nvUBFOpwnxJY5Q7SwAChNsXHylswTryOVw1y8DiehPZ7OD2Mw2PXQbpW38Oz624S6G5L3jLjrTBXCq-Muu2yshEW0KMpWY-ZtHVa4C4BoH4f3sv4vLxqELRQEsvFJyK3MIyrlNiK-XfEqkamiENLwwQUVrgSB_lQnNf8rJQes5UTcGpg9kIBwB-mTzbr5C1jZDB_567QBCfkXy5b8qIS-pw%3D%3D)

---

One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it’s anyone’s guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn’t be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. clean_body: Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, OR let the government enforce mandates? . Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow American, The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role. We’ve lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations. | SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, August 17TH One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it’s anyone’s guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn’t be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate. Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us. How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status! The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word. Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them. Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked. Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border. Will the hypocrisy ever end? Thanks for letting us know – Thank you, Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Gov. DeSantis has failed Florida with his reprehensible COVID response.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
He’s a disgrace both to the office he holds and to the beautiful state we all call home. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34699689/302790615/-870745794?refcode=20210826_p_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2Q4MjdiZi04OTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJaqit4eO2rNDEe0s8twiEUVBH55GJq_PbkJ-CSjdIo=)
---

Friend,

You’ve heard me say a million times now that I _love_ Florida. And that’s why it breaks my heart to see what’s happening to her right now. Today, even as vaccines are widely available, COVID-19 continues to wreak havoc. And while the Delta variant may be surging all over the country, one-fifth of the entire nation’s COVID-19 cases are currently located in Florida.

**Make no mistake, friend: The situation we’re in today is thanks to the absolute failure of leadership we’ve seen in Governor Ron DeSantis.[If you agree, add your name now to condemn his “leadership” as governor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34699690/302790616/1638668248?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2Q4MjdiZi04OTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJaqit4eO2rNDEe0s8twiEUVBH55GJq_PbkJ-CSjdIo=&emci=18849fd8-ba05-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=fcd827bf-8906-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=8807089)**

Is it any surprise that vaccination rates are now far too low when Gov. DeSantis’ vaccine “rollout” began by prioritizing the wealthier, whiter, more well-connected communities where his campaign donors are more likely to live?

Is it any surprise that too many Floridians continue to get sick and die needlessly because Gov. DeSantis has taken it upon himself to ban mask requirements and threaten to withhold pay from school superintendents who try to use mask policies to keep our children safe?

The truth is that Gov. DeSantis is failing us, and he’s a disgrace both to the office he holds and to the beautiful state of Florida that we all call home. He doesn’t care about what happens to you, or me, or to anyone who can’t help him achieve his goal of becoming president. And that’s not the kind of person who should be serving as our governor.

I’m not running for governor because I think it’s a nice stepping stone to another, better job. I’m running for governor because I care deeply about Florida, and about her people -- _all_ of her people. I’m interested in keeping Floridians safe and healthy, and providing everyone with the opportunities they need to get ahead. Not in stoking culture wars and running for president.

**[That’s why I’m asking, friend: If you’re with me, add your name today to condemn Gov. DeSantis for his absolute failure to lead as our governor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34699691/302790617/1638668248?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2Q4MjdiZi04OTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJaqit4eO2rNDEe0s8twiEUVBH55GJq_PbkJ-CSjdIo=&emci=18849fd8-ba05-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=fcd827bf-8906-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=8807089)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34699692/302790618/1638668248?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2Q4MjdiZi04OTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJaqit4eO2rNDEe0s8twiEUVBH55GJq_PbkJ-CSjdIo=&emci=18849fd8-ba05-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=fcd827bf-8906-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=8807089)[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34699693/302790619/1638668248?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2Q4MjdiZi04OTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EJaqit4eO2rNDEe0s8twiEUVBH55GJq_PbkJ-CSjdIo=&emci=18849fd8-ba05-ec11-b563-501ac57bf4cb&emdi=fcd827bf-8906-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=8807089)

clean_body: He’s a disgrace both to the office he holds and to the beautiful state we all call home. | | | | = Friend, You’ve heard me say a million times now that I love Florida. And that’s why it breaks my heart to see what’s happening to her right now. Today, even as vaccines are widely available, COVID-19 continues to wreak havoc. And while the Delta variant may be surging all over the country, one-fifth of the entire nation’s COVID-19 cases are currently located in Florida. Make no mistake, friend: The situation we’re in today is thanks to the absolute failure of leadership we’ve seen in Governor Ron DeSantis. Is it any surprise that vaccination rates are now far too low when Gov. DeSantis’ vaccine “rollout” began by prioritizing the wealthier, whiter, more well-connected communities where his campaign donors are more likely to live? Is it any surprise that too many Floridians continue to get sick and die needlessly because Gov. DeSantis has taken it upon himself to ban mask requirements and threaten to withhold pay from school superintendents who try to use mask policies to keep our children safe? The truth is that Gov. DeSantis is failing us, and he’s a disgrace both to the office he holds and to the beautiful state of Florida that we all call home. He doesn’t care about what happens to you, or me, or to anyone who can’t help him achieve his goal of becoming president. And that’s not the kind of person who should be serving as our governor. I’m not running for governor because I think it’s a nice stepping stone to another, better job. I’m running for governor because I care deeply about Florida, and about her people -- all of her people. I’m interested in keeping Floridians safe and healthy, and providing everyone with the opportunities they need to get ahead. Not in stoking culture wars and running for president. Together, I know we can defeat Gov. DeSantis and finally build a Florida for all Floridians. Thanks, Charlie Crist = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

Hello, At the end of this email, **[I’m going to ask for your help to reach our August fundraising goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34699840/302791279/630694818?refcode=MTH_em_20210826_X_FR_EOM_X_ACT_US_all_all_EOM_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTdmMDA2Ny04YTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUauBnGnjmyWUHvEYI98BY6KkRfdMcyrUcVRsoc2Msk=)** But first, let’s back up a bit and talk about the work Democrats have been doing in the Senate and our path forward from here. We’ve worked hard over the past several weeks to pass the historic infrastructure bill and a framework for the budget reconciliation package. We have a once-in-a-generation opportunity to take on climate change and create millions of good-paying jobs with the Build Back Better effort. That’s what future generations and hardworking people like you deserve. So I pushed to make sure this effort included acting on climate change with the urgency it deserves. We’ve included a clean electricity standard for utility companies, and are working to include an efficiency rebates program for household appliances — an effort that will help reduce carbon emissions and put money back in hardworking folks’ pockets. All in all, the Build Back Better packages will invest billions in New Mexico. We’re talking the biggest federal investment in infrastructure and social programs since the Great Depression. That’s exactly what we need as we work to get to the other side of this pandemic and address the climate crisis. The second half of this effort — the budget reconciliation package — wouldn’t be possible without the Democratic majority. That’s why I’ve also been helping fundraise for my colleagues in tough battleground races, like Senator Mark Kelly and Senator Rev. Raphael Warnock. We can’t afford to lose even one seat. If we do, we’ll risk losing the Democratic majority that achieved vaccination targets, cut childhood poverty in half, and everything in between. **I’ll be frank: Fundraising has slowed down in recent days. But we can’t afford to fall behind if we’re going to continue this important work and defend our razor-thin Senate majority. Will you chip in any amount you can toward our goal to help us catch up on fundraising before the end of the month?** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34699841/302791280/630694818?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=MTH_em_20210826_X_FR_EOM_X_ACT_US_all_all_EOM_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTdmMDA2Ny04YTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUauBnGnjmyWUHvEYI98BY6KkRfdMcyrUcVRsoc2Msk=) | [$25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34699842/302791281/630694818?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=MTH_em_20210826_X_FR_EOM_X_ACT_US_all_all_EOM_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTdmMDA2Ny04YTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUauBnGnjmyWUHvEYI98BY6KkRfdMcyrUcVRsoc2Msk=)

So many of the Democrats who sung her praises for helping us take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell aren't willing to back her financially and help launch her campaign.

That's why we're reaching out to you directly. As one of our 1,000 best supporters, we know we can count on you when we need it the most \-- when Stacey needs it the most. Please, if you want to fight for a world where we don't just stall the Republican agenda but make progress on our own, chip in now. body:
With a 50-50 split, control of the Senate could come down to any one race...
#

**$28,000,000**
This is how much Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans announced they’d raised to spend to win battleground Senate races, like ours. Their path to the majority runs right through North Carolina, and it’s up to us to stop them.
**$3**
That’s the amount we’re asking you to donate today to make sure we elect Cheri Beasley and hold the majority for Democrats. With a 50-50 split, control of the Senate could come down to any one race, and North Carolina is one of only three toss-ups according to the Cook Political Report.
Now, $3 may not seem like much against Mitch McConnell’s millions, but we are not alone in this. Collectively, we are far more powerful than any super PAC.
By the time you’re reading this, someone else on our team will have already made a $3 contribution too. And by the time you're done, someone else you don’t know will chip in whatever they can afford as well. Now they're waiting for you...what do you say?
**[Please make a $3 contribution to elect Cheri Beasley today. We have an important deadline in a few days, and we need a lot of donations before then to make sure we can compete with Republicans’ spending.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34700932/302795034/-928165870?refcode2=12875ab4-8e06-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210826-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjg3NWFiNC04ZTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SHkWwfs2y6NCO5WmB07-d8-0I3PmlFbKq6iXGWq4S5w=)**

name: Team Franchot
subject: Save the Bay
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter --
Earlier this Summer, the University of Maryland Center for Environmental Science released its annual report card on the health of our Chesapeake Bay. This year, it got a C.
While this is an improvement from last year, Peter Franchot believes that we can and should do better. That’s why as your next Governor, he’s going to implement a plan to finally guarantee a lasting and healthy future for the Chesapeake Bay.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/chesapeakebayreportcard?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/chesapeakebayreportcard?amount=20.22]Peter Franchot will work with the EPA and the signatory states to the Chesapeake Clean Water Blueprint to ramp up our efforts to achieve clean air, clean water, and lasting health for the Bay by the end of his first term. Key aspects of his plan will include:
*
Adding
one
billion
adult
oysters
in
Maryland’s
portion
of
the
watershed
and
working
with
the
Commonwealth
of
Virginia
to
secure
a
similar
commitment;
*
Reducing
oxygen
dead
zones
caused
by
algae
blooms
by
75%,
and
creating
an
international
scientific
competition
for
innovative,
affordable
solutions
to
solve
the
problems
of
pollution
in
the
Bay;
*
Increased
efforts
to
conserve
land
near
our
waterways
reducing
urban
and
suburban
stormwater
runoff,
and
strengthening
state
smart
growth
regulations
that
combat
urban
sprawl
and
promote
dense,
transit-oriented
development;
*
Working
with
President
Biden’s
EPA
and
Pennsylvania
and
New
York
to
ensure
accountability
to
meet
upstream
pollution
reduction
targets
that
will
protect
the
Bay;
and
*
A
statewide
effort
to
preserve
Maryland’s
tree
canopy,
particularly
old
growth
forests.
While we’re incredibly excited about Peter’s plan to finally guarantee a lasting and healthy future for the Chesapeake Bay, here’s the hard truth: we first need to win this competitive election.
We’re building a people-powered movement to create a people-centered government, and we rely on grassroots supporters like you to keep our campaign going. So what do you say?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/chesapeakebayreportcard?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/chesapeakebayreportcard?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/chesapeakebayreportcard?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/chesapeakebayreportcard?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/chesapeakebayreportcard]As our Local Candidate for Governor, Peter Franchot understands how the Chesapeake Bay has shaped Maryland’s way of life for generations -- and he’s willing to take the bold, necessary steps to guarantee that it has a lasting and healthy future.
With your help, we can make Peter’s bold vision to restore the Bay to good health and preserve its legacy for future generations a reality. Your contribution will help pay for more yard signs, field literature, magnets and stickers, future field offices, and other vital tools that will help us get the word out about the need to save the Bay, and so much more.
Chip in to help us save the Chesapeake Bay. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/chesapeakebayreportcard?amount=20.22]
Thank you for your support,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/chesapeakebayreportcard?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401

clean_body: [ Peter -- Earlier this Summer, the University of Maryland Center for Environmental Science released its annual report card on the health of our Chesapeake Bay. This year, it got a C. While this is an improvement from last year, Peter Franchot believes that we can and should do better. That’s why as your next Governor, he’s going to implement a plan to finally guarantee a lasting and healthy future for the Chesapeake Bay. [ Franchot will work with the EPA and the signatory states to the Chesapeake Clean Water Blueprint to ramp up our efforts to achieve clean air, clean water, and lasting health for the Bay by the end of his first term. Key aspects of his plan will include: Adding one billion adult oysters in Maryland’s portion of the watershed and working with the Commonwealth of Virginia to secure a similar commitment; Reducing oxygen dead zones caused by algae blooms by 75%, and creating an international scientific competition for innovative, affordable solutions to solve the problems of pollution in the Bay; Increased efforts to conserve land near our waterways reducing urban and suburban stormwater runoff, and strengthening state smart growth regulations that combat urban sprawl and promote dense, transit-oriented development; Working with President Biden’s EPA and Pennsylvania and New York to ensure accountability to meet upstream pollution reduction targets that will protect the Bay; and * A statewide effort to preserve Maryland’s tree canopy, particularly old growth forests. While we’re incredibly excited about Peter’s plan to finally guarantee a lasting and healthy future for the Chesapeake Bay, here’s the hard truth: we first need to win this competitive election. We’re building a people-powered movement to create a people-centered government, and we rely on grassroots supporters like you to keep our campaign going. So what do you say? CHIP IN $10 [] CHIP IN $20.22 [] CHIP IN $50 [] CHIP IN $100 [] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [ our Local Candidate for Governor, Peter Franchot understands how the Chesapeake Bay has shaped Maryland’s way of life for generations -- and he’s willing to take the bold, necessary steps to guarantee that it has a lasting and healthy future. With your help, we can make Peter’s bold vision to restore the Bay to good health and preserve its legacy for future generations a reality. Your contribution will help pay for more yard signs, field literature, magnets and stickers, future field offices, and other vital tools that will help us get the word out about the need to save the Bay, and so much more. Chip in to help us save the Chesapeake Bay. [] Thank you for your support, Team Franchot DONATE [ Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer Friends of Peter Franchot P.O. Box 6648 Annapolis, MD 21401 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . | Dear Friends,
---
| Since I launched my campaign for Senate in April, we have seen such great support from every corner of our state! Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, Smiley, we are on track to win!
Patty Murray has been in office for 30 years and less than a third of Washingtonians even want her to run again. THIS IS OUR CHANCE - THIS IS OUR FIGHT! Together we will turn the page. Together we will take back the Senate and be a voice for the people of Washington State, not for Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer.
And over the last few months, we have grown tremendously, but I wanted to take a moment, sit down, and see who has been with me from the very beginning.
So when election day comes and we win, I can look at this list and say Smiley was there from the start.

subject: Virginia is not a safe blue state

body:
This might be shocking to hear, but the Donald Trump-endorsed Republican candidate for governor, Glenn Youngkin, is the historical favorite in this election.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34702513/302801077/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTY1YzZkOS05MTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3L025T3K1Yj4kV4cxnLiw4TrbzqDrlOXTF0fhQw-_kQ=&emci=a15d3c23-8706-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=b965c6d9-9106-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, this might be shocking to hear, but **the Donald Trump-endorsed Republican candidate for governor, Glenn Youngkin, is the historical favorite in this election.** I’ll tell you why, but first, **_[will you rush a contribution to Terry McAuliffe’s campaign so we can counter Glenn Youngkin’s historical advantage in this race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34702514/302801078/-1523417772?refcode=mw_em_210826_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTY1YzZkOS05MTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3L025T3K1Yj4kV4cxnLiw4TrbzqDrlOXTF0fhQw-_kQ=)_** Here’s the deal. For decades now, Virginia voters have rebuked the sitting president by electing someone from the opposing party to be their Governor. Case in point, when I was elected Governor, it was right after George W. Bush won the Presidency. Since Joe Biden won last year, _**Glenn Youngkin is favored to win this year.**_ But here’s the good news. The one time Virginia bucked that trend was in 2012, _when Terry McAuliffe was elected for the first time._ It’s going to take a massive grassroots effort to pull this off again, but with your help, I think we can do it. **_[Believe me when I say this, Derek: Virginia is not a safe blue state. I'm urgently asking you to chip in any amount right now to elect Terry McAuliffe and reverse the historical trend that's favoring Glenn Youngkin.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34702515/302801079/-1523417772?refcode=mw_em_210826_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTY1YzZkOS05MTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3L025T3K1Yj4kV4cxnLiw4TrbzqDrlOXTF0fhQw-_kQ=)_** Thank you for being a part of history, Mark Warner **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34702516/302801080/-1523417772?refcode=mw_em_210826_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTY1YzZkOS05MTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3L025T3K1Yj4kV4cxnLiw4TrbzqDrlOXTF0fhQw-_kQ=)**

name: Jim Jordan
subject: COVID Vaccine Mandate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195012:6saDoj2NC:m:1:3253819041:292B5FE3EC4E9CA8C4BBF6DD9B55E570:r)
---

Peter,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you 're reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we'd agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren't vaccinated, and that isn't their role.

**We 've lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195012:6saDoj2NC:m:1:3253819041:292B5FE3EC4E9CA8C4BBF6DD9B55E570:r)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195012:6saDoj2NC:m:1:3253819041:292B5FE3EC4E9CA8C4BBF6DD9B55E570:r)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, August 26TH

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195012:6saDoj2NC:m:1:3253819041:292B5FE3EC4E9CA8C4BBF6DD9B55E570:r)

---

One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it's anyone's guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn't be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be "defeated" when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can't trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don 't wear them. **

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195012:6saDoj2NC:m:1:3253819041:292B5FE3EC4E9CA8C4BBF6DD9B55E570:r)**

Thanks for letting us know -

Thank you,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195012:6saDoj2NC:m:1:3253819041:292B5FE3EC4E9CA8C4BBF6DD9B55E570:r)
Jim Jordan

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195012:6saDoj2NC:m:1:3253819041:292B5FE3EC4E9CA8C4BBF6DD9B55E570:r)

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

Fellow Conservative,

Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d23642116d534bf4bf6af0aa95b056e2&_e=-DR1Q1NH-oZ1S2lSxqVg7KeRzcAyqmrk3tJf1jwkZ9zLYVZpWCggCO15Yydu3WMEDRyA8M2XYGQURPckqTYFgKhVM2DVDoIcNsKXQw1zvO9pGYGBanASFCsIMq-hIDxCWKAcbWogucCIR_Usoyg9FRVx8_Cgq2K4pEH44qRMWRTMThUghoedBDFmFhbiy1JfqzR0GIv435qLDFDpoGOzf2OlZwTxLCU_1WKrBhRmS4-2AiRTu1Qq0vdBjygV9HjCrjbi6p04Aq3ZFkwJUbLIMjOw2zmxX4M2_pxTzEqWmfaUrJuSrV1qNClTBwWZk05FzFBaJ2DpL1aiIBHP-MRv7J1v_Ef1Vc_apgX0PAj4V6leGWjnWU2mN9ifPMeLfIvDrzCWfr7doyKl2msqRl6pyEqSojL95JaKhYfofuKjFxxrqujTO4rX63PdYVKqynR1eoPsJN0Zr7PxmddFhz1NVw%3D%3D)
I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d23642116d534bf4bf6af0aa95b056e2&_e=-DR1Q1NH-oZ1S2lSxqVg7KeRzcAyqmrk3tJf1jwkZ9zLYVZpWCggCO15Yydu3WMEDRyA8M2XYGQURPckqTYFgKhVM2DVDoIcNsKXQw1zvO9pGYGBanASFCsIMq-hIDxCWKAcbWogucCIR_Usoyg9FRVx8_Cgq2K4pEH44qRMWRTMThUghoedBDFmFhbiy1JfqzR0GIv435qLDFDpoGOzf2OlZwTxLCU_1WKrBhRmS48VWZuHbd5DvtRcr-lO8AFgqpLf5XakcLm9bbv3NHjd1_qEEqwfI-I3PoJk41oJVWX_WKvpajwzwsOEozjfmRliiPFDXEzkSIkAg9ncB1Ic5ou6GkIYiHiQXBgCQ9oXEcskPzu_1OSUBnk6SOBW6ercQ1j-B9FWAna-Pzr6G90gI1Ge4Tg0NaxCYrg17c3Cdi9dAAisdX4-E87EfjUvLTNkdixmsS3nDJXdSdvcJrQW0A%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d23642116d534bf4bf6af0aa95b056e2&_e=-DR1Q1NH-oZ1S2lSxqVg7KeRzcAyqmrk3tJf1jwkZ9zLYVZpWCggCO15Yydu3WMEDRyA8M2XYGQURPckqTYFgKhVM2DVDoIcNsKXQw1zvO9pGYGBanASFCsIMq-hIDxCWKAcbWogucCIR_Usoyg9FRVx8_Cgq2K4pEH44qRMWRTMThUghoedBDFmFhbiy1JfqzR0GIv435qLDFDpoGOzf2OlZwTxLCU_1WKrBhRmS4_n-00ynVyTjI4J4kyjYpUU01DnaEzcE68I66JZfzgnBzjhjaqFbrLd_5AEP1I4awNpznaiap4xeQ5p_Vc0-khHVif3yn35wFj6g_GC8Akl0Sw2DMrEtr150Prt2b-TuQJn0jHbcpyDRNn7tY7W0UfJf192aIjFFs26_hWwzhzR9v94uj_oKTNGAWUvyJxiMGoXLG0cgAYBChHo1LWsWPUOeWwlJppl470Yn5l8jbYEQA%3D%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes... August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever. I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist. This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream. Right now, Democrats are... Opening and destroying our borders. They are granting dangerous amnesty that will flood every corner of America. Raising our taxes like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable. Defunding the police, leading to a surge in violent crime Erasing historical figures from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln Teetering on the edge of a dangerous foreign policy crisis These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Did you see me on Sean Hannity?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195418:6BOWGj2pN:m:1:3253819041:B86D3B16E115A97E1C4BAABD79F22FEC:r)

Peter,

Last night I was on Sean Hannity, **[and I wanted to make sure you saw the highlight reel!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195418:6BOWGj2pN:m:1:3253819041:B86D3B16E115A97E1C4BAABD79F22FEC:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195418:6BOWGj2pN:m:1:3253819041:B86D3B16E115A97E1C4BAABD79F22FEC:r)
As I discussed with Sean, I launched my Senate campaign in Georgia because **I believe in putting in hard work to achieve the American Dream. EVERYONE should have the opportunity to achieve their dreams.**

Unfortunately, our national leaders are too busy putting their self-interests first and playing politics to see the harm they are causing our country.

Americans are hurting and deserve a leader who will PUT THIS COUNTRY FIRST. I'm that leader, Peter, **[and it's why I'm asking for you to join my team today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195418:6BOWGj2pN:m:1:3253819041:B86D3B16E115A97E1C4BAABD79F22FEC:r)**

[** CHIP IN $10 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195419:6BOWGj2pN:m:1:3253819041:B86D3B16E115A97E1C4BAABD79F22FEC:r)
[** CHIP IN $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195420:6BOWGj2pN:m:1:3253819041:B86D3B16E115A97E1C4BAABD79F22FEC:r)
[** CHIP IN $50 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195421:6BOWGj2pN:m:1:3253819041:B86D3B16E115A97E1C4BAABD79F22FEC:r)
I have what it takes to stand up to D.C. politicians, WIN this race, and help WIN BACK the Senate majority. **[But I can't do it without your help, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195418:6BOWGj2pN:m:1:3253819041:B86D3B16E115A97E1C4BAABD79F22FEC:r)**

I've played a lot of sports, and I know it takes a strong team to achieve a common goal. I know we have what it takes to win. With your help, we can BEAT our opponent this election.

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195418:6BOWGj2pN:m:1:3253819041:B86D3B16E115A97E1C4BAABD79F22FEC:r)
I appreciated Sean having me on his show because, Peter, even though I just announced my candidacy; this Senate race is already heating up.

Before I even announced my candidacy, my opponent launched ATTACKS against me. It's clear my opponent is terrified of my campaign.

We don't need to worry about outraising our opponent, but we do need to build the momentum necessary to WIN THIS RACE.

It takes a strong team, Peter. Please, join me today. Let's WIN THIS RACE and WIN BACK the Senate majority.

Sincerely,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195418:6BOWGj2pN:m:1:3253819041:B86D3B16E115A97E1C4BAABD79F22FEC:r)
Herschel Walker

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195418:6BOWGj2pN:m:1:3253819041:B86D3B16E115A97E1C4BAABD79F22FEC:r)

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Mexican Border Violence, Drug Smuggling Surge; Federal Agents Come Under Gunfire
body:
While President Biden’s Afghanistan debacle justifiably receives the world’s attention and vast media coverage, the Mexican border in the U.S.’s own backyard should not be ignored.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | August 25, 2021
---|---|---

# [Mexican Border Violence, Drug Smuggling Surge; Federal Agents Come Under Gunfire](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56517&L=25695&F=H&)
While President Biden’s Afghanistan debacle justifiably receives the world’s attention and vast media coverage, the Mexican border in the U.S.’s own backyard should not be ignored. Besides the unparalleled onslaught of illegal immigrants, the region is becoming increasingly violent with unprecedented criminal activity that includes a distressing escalation in drug smuggling and brazen attacks against American federal agents. Organized Transnational Criminal Organizations (TCOs) are behind the movement, and they are a serious threat to national security and public safety, according to Customs and Border Protection (CBP), the frontline Homeland Security agency charged with keeping terrorists and their weapons out of the U.S.

Fellow American,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4c4d300c6d88477c894dc2f348e01a33&_e=cM0K0xaUIgGbEcQmd8es9zVxy2N4KVJrumRd7tHXaK0MtDyRfxCqH5Y3b8XhlB24vl82HuiKd5AFpR6I9gwTotPphQwOOOMZEy1x-Ugeq5zmcWJkphLyCxUMNRBMHD0CG5SEMYgC1l4hnEphrdbvXtf32_Xga-sDWBO0GDcHfImqH2YbIb8R0VDIkeBV6LB1J0Vq2-tvaaIZamvLralAgSdAv7CgTpWh3ZICG_MNoO9cgAv5bRszIqwOQxq807pW5lbYKwqj4LWKmnfc15VQuDdAOHn91zfoVMmuWW5DnFzhSvkrNmJad1vEl6fZMPqLRZnPK1mBCsvxqKreyVwS3-2UF0KKK6AdUpEHIjp5FLRzR0DBRXzl67RIO7V_nvPGIQ92jtAR_h-_xJuFSlebAyNZmPz0xWkyF2ZhuitOdYF3X1wDpldWzYHjX88VWbcfNWZ6TLFsLtPJkK2Z1zl9_zs17bu7PuT9Q6I73a5fpzuM2JHZSDX5waYKf3xhNIp7clVmyvWqMl650c3YmIKCOw%3D%3D)**

One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it’s anyone’s guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn’t be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4c4d300c6d88477c894dc2f348e01a33&_e=cM0K0xaUIgGbEcQmd8es9zVxy2N4KVJrumRd7tHXaK0MtDyRfxCqH5Y3b8XhlB24vl82HuiKd5AFpR6I9gwTotPphQwOOOMZEy1x-Ugeq5zmcWJkphLyCxUMNRBMHD0CG5SEMYgC1l4hnEphrdbvXtf32_Xga-sDWBO0GDcHfImqH2YbIb8R0VDIkeBV6LB1J0Vq2-tvaaIZamvLralAgSdAv7CgTpWh3ZICG_MNoO9cgAv5bRszIqwOQxq807pW5lbYKwqj4LWKmnfc15VQuDdAOHn91zfoVMmuWW5DnFzhSvkrNmJad1vEl6fZMPqLxcb1CvnEiZcfGw8hOlKSZdSva6vFsVhVdJJEBFPy2tYJFvceRuK2AzskGtQ4CxMnpoVyK5OLen8_lDXk-AuMflU8Jq5xDVK1cnKromcJ6ZO9thkZ_8FKmYK8z0Y8vj1zUZlQWjQu-9jPnSF50SC0TAfuJnZMs0nz-eMYg3LihDW9R-i9qyHtH-PiuZewXA2WFk1KngGxOA7TGQKOoOwYVA%3D%3D)**

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: I promise this fight is worth it.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Right after I was shot, when I was first starting my recovery process, it was difficult to imagine a future where I could walk on my own.
#

Friend —
After I was shot, I experienced the darkest of dark days. I didn’t know how to walk anymore. And I struggled to find the words that once came so easily.
It was difficult to summon hope, but I did just that.
I put one foot in front of the other even when the challenge before me seemed insurmountable. Now, I am asking you to do the same:
[**Help us continue our fight to end gun violence once and for all by making a $3 contribution to Giffords before our August 31st fundraising deadline. Your donation will immediately be put to work so we can pass background checks and save lives.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?refcode=em210826-1-15&t=1&refcode2=743_3935704_Y7hNuC&akid=743%2E3935704%2EY7hNuC)
Over the last ten years, I’ve learned that making progress requires imagination and persistence — the ability to envision a better future, and the doggedness to see it through, even when change happens slower than we’d like.
In my recovery, I visualized myself being able to walk on my own and find the words to communicate again. And I kept that image in my mind through long hours of occupational and speech therapy.
Now you try: Imagine a world without gun violence. Imagine sending our kids to school without fear of a mass shooting. Imagine neighborhoods where families and communities feel safe. Keep that image in your mind and it will help you keep up the fight!
This is tireless work, but it is worth it. I promise you. The hardest fights always are.
[**So please, make a $3 donation before our August 31st fundraising deadline to help us keep up the fight to end gun violence, once and for all.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?refcode=em210826-1-15&t=2&refcode2=743_3935704_Y7hNuC&akid=743%2E3935704%2EY7hNuC)
Thank you for standing with me. It means a lot.
My very best,
Gabby Giffords
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-aug21?refcode=em210826-1-15&t=3&refcode2=743_3935704_Y7hNuC&akid=743%2E3935704%2EY7hNuC)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=743%2E3935704%2EY7hNuC) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

clean_body: We need you to send immediate reinforcements, Peter. | The latest polls out of Battleground Florida show that Nancy Pelosi ally and Anti-Trump Impeachment Manager Val Demings has effectively TIED Trump-Endorsed Senator Marco Rubio. Look -- we can’t afford to lose Florida. If we do, all hope of a Senate Majority is lost. That’s why we need a surge of Grassroots Republican support to help break the logjam and move back into the lead! But unless 2,727 Republican Patriots chip in today, the odds of us meeting our goal are slim... | | | | | | | | | | The Democrats are already raising (and spending) shocking amounts of money to secure victory in Florida, Peter. In fact, they’re prepared to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to seize control of this longtime Republican Senate seat. We can’t let them win. It’s essential that we find another 2,727 Republican Patriots who are willing to chip in to Stand with Trump and help Keep Florida Red. Everything depends upon it! | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Marco Rubio Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I’m running
