I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=167c4aa543ed4d2a831402f513dc40ab&_e=ozfxMeD-4OVtMmI0i8LDCGPPtybSFfJo30ohHMywVqiRkEbVlp95KoVRLLVikRVS_s-inQu0Fm0XEzDhJNr6PNb_rhF-XOL819bl_RjVxjKcWkUyJUlrTtGanTvUf0Q9fbEB6P9JLX0IGtNem47ZtM4bSGes-UoIJUn2-FcKIeZJP29nQ6VD2dcunH3I_FwR5z-5L2lJve6mRMIy9pLtXJUuVSA8-EXPeRdJUuiARc9VHDoP6M5si98XjhtXmbqnA1YQivJyg-6bMoCuC2nRAkL_OiEBC6lvyvo1POujYJukF7gIO8zoSEYtosEGe9S81bTELCCJdvoWlparRIa1AqW08UT_vmxp3xG8TODCmFN0eSXenRToh3VjL3zVLaR7GGSOz5PI5HuJUvTy7-NKCFphN3EfbQ2lkQoO8ySdTI7alFq9HYIlpg8YGysuQmGz81rcyKY9ih1fIvZE4BSbelUBY6zYaOe0QCwDZrlk_tY%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=167c4aa543ed4d2a831402f513dc40ab&_e=ozfxMeD-4OVtMmI0i8LDCGPPtybSFfJo30ohHMywVqiRkEbVlp95KoVRLLVikRVS_s-inQu0Fm0XEzDhJNr6PNb_rhF-XOL819bl_RjVxjKcWkUyJUlrTtGanTvUf0Q9fbEB6P9JLX0IGtNem47ZtM4bSGes-UoIJUn2-FcKIeZJP29nQ6VD2dcunH3I_FwR5z-5L2lJve6mRMIy9pLtXJUuVSA8-EXPeRdJUuiARc9VHDoP6M5si98XjhtXmbqnA1YQivJyg-6bMoCuC2nRAoiPqKVHQC89u3MUlq_QeyFEJnS57FXUyPVx3VTzbaNsoaTD1htSgzf--HPpXYwaOHVSH7GhHgLYUJXIWVvyN3GmNUekwbBkIAdvSEg73FKZH6lEQpqgmnHNRiRGMDXyOP5kUgzf29e6hQ_4jgC27tuDQ03MmIxpmmBPY1p5gTxgGtjN2AGap1HKcaIblLONKqbe8JGFuX-xAGyGD2VCD6Q%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=167c4aa543ed4d2a831402f513dc40ab&_e=ozfxMeD-4OVtMmI0i8LDCGPPtybSFfJo30ohHMywVqiRkEbVlp95KoVRLLVikRVS_s-inQu0Fm0XEzDhJNr6PNb_rhF-XOL819bl_RjVxjKcWkUyJUlrTtGanTvUf0Q9fbEB6P9JLX0IGtNem47ZtM4bSGes-UoIJUn2-FcKIeZJP29nQ6VD2dcunH3I_FwR5z-5L2lJve6mRMIy9pLtXJUuVSA8-EXPeRdJUuiARc9VHDoP6M5si98XjhtXmbqnA1YQivJyg-6bMoCuC2nRAmF0l6dnJgJZrZzY83xZmsptqSGOoBfq1kihnDXPErbxsfEhxNbnyUrxKaRABbdi2JNucOHJ_ninV_ataetq1xyhrSrLbn43qN7U1m45EAEHiqpSbm90ee8nx5IOjN_b2t4nd6crTiH6KOCubLnpKsy6XilLJBIiKM0VuPrFpjozWs_32v6pGEiHYxYS2-JBHHqkkThX0i5v3bm0BMi-xGY%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=167c4aa543ed4d2a831402f513dc40ab&_e=ozfxMeD-4OVtMmI0i8LDCGPPtybSFfJo30ohHMywVqiRkEbVlp95KoVRLLVikRVS_s-inQu0Fm0XEzDhJNr6PNb_rhF-XOL819bl_RjVxjKcWkUyJUlrTtGanTvUf0Q9fbEB6P9JLX0IGtNem47ZtM4bSGes-UoIJUn2-FcKIeZJP29nQ6VD2dcunH3I_FwR5z-5L2lJve6mRMIy9pLtXJUuVSA8-EXPeRdJUuiARc9VHDoP6M5si98XjhtXmbqnA1YQivJyg-6bMoCuC2nRAoU5ja3fajFwXlj1SFjA_6k8CBNZVEG6PF7uWSRB4vr4NIOyTkMVdAVbr_uOB7tUOsv7zudrmLMMKuH4gPLHqhYBYcLNMyPsChwifDyl2q7O_P4F2GYTWBMtBvOHksgy9yH4IV03l7if5HmCHQQ48Iyen4gRcePfynaJCac_cI-SA-9x5adUVID7m0IjmIcueaB_GdMe4QH5dFbtIp5pht8%3D)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=167c4aa543ed4d2a831402f513dc40ab&_e=ozfxMeD-4OVtMmI0i8LDCGPPtybSFfJo30ohHMywVqiRkEbVlp95KoVRLLVikRVS_s-inQu0Fm0XEzDhJNr6PNb_rhF-XOL819bl_RjVxjKcWkUyJUlrTtGanTvUf0Q9fbEB6P9JLX0IGtNem47ZtM4bSGes-UoIJUn2-FcKIeZJP29nQ6VD2dcunH3I_FwR5z-5L2lJve6mRMIy9pLtXJUuVSA8-EXPeRdJUuiARc9VHDoP6M5si98XjhtXmbqnA1YQivJyg-6bMoCuC2nRAr_2nQ8WTa4xZ06EoHUjYxlcpQ8S7mVpLL1VnVHCQwjMkSsjS0aB_Ftg2mNnJthCm55gbMyFvyUd-ZaxmuxN0QOztGpxO2TTUhEqO3N4_GfM0WZmhS_nbKEpcWl5Dth9IZh7e-BOmOotoNN4SpFUq4yisC0vyfzfjxaCXJzjY4BA5fpfDibtGTVJa2IkKL04cGoAgquU519vJOB3a-tZ63s%3D)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=167c4aa543ed4d2a831402f513dc40ab&_e=ozfxMeD-4OVtMmI0i8LDCGPPtybSFfJo30ohHMywVqiRkEbVlp95KoVRLLVikRVS_s-inQu0Fm0XEzDhJNr6PNb_rhF-XOL819bl_RjVxjKcWkUyJUlrTtGanTvUf0Q9fbEB6P9JLX0IGtNem47ZtM4bSGes-UoIJUn2-FcKIeZJP29nQ6VD2dcunH3I_FwR5z-5L2lJve6mRMIy9pLtXJUuVSA8-EXPeRdJUuiARc9VHDoP6M5si98XjhtXmbqnA1YQivJyg-6bMoCuC2nRAhlmVxq_4TRc18UNYWkW4WdHTNkAk708olW69wEInVavWk-rx6_Cc9Ljk6otruU9BOa9bxRrvDhthxBOKWpvAJ1eFbznkiCMN218wWbRLvpB4noZXfs864Et0ghvJetZPZodFN0fa92Il8leX6JHwMzXSAxMtXdKCSvI-sFeLTKmLzHeLjMi-FQjJaeGRyaihOgYw-Usa-PN2u47iqutgpE%3D)
Herschel Walker

P.S. The liberals in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. **[Please help my campaign get off to a critically important start by donating $10, $20, or even $50 today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=167c4aa543ed4d2a831402f513dc40ab&_e=ozfxMeD-4OVtMmI0i8LDCGPPtybSFfJo30ohHMywVqiRkEbVlp95KoVRLLVikRVS_s-inQu0Fm0XEzDhJNr6PNb_rhF-XOL819bl_RjVxjKcWkUyJUlrTtGanTvUf0Q9fbEB6P9JLX0IGtNem47ZtM4bSGes-UoIJUn2-FcKIeZJP29nQ6VD2dcunH3I_FwR5z-5L2lJve6mRMIy9pLtXJUuVSA8-EXPeRdJUuiARc9VHDoP6M5si98XjhtXmbqnA1YQivJyg-6bMoCuC2nRApJynJDRnLxHjMYq_O8DjhqbK-elup5aoVVMH-5NffZOy1MDaZYRVeZHywe6FVG8fEEwpD1UCCnyJmt8-SeWi11xnuqv4r2ttrenyGuGL_Js5610mzHV17gT328y5Ao037TOw03M1i7R2dpRjONOAJiEAHLh0AKHPUmkfeoffiQoiCovf5CMp-L6-Nk_PmX-8DIwKXXbih3FHzgUq9BXeLQ%3D)** Thank you.

name: John Fetterman
subject: so incredibly humbled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
THIS is what real grassroots momentum from working people looks like.
#
Peter,
**Here's a piece of incredible news:** I am *so* proud that, last quarter, our campaign was the most reliant on grassroots donations of any other candidate in this race, _Democrat or Republican._ 69.86% of our total fundraising over the past quarter came from grassroots contributions of $200 or less.
I am so incredibly humbled, Peter. 😭 Because THIS is what real grassroots momentum from working people looks like.
But here's the mathematical reality about running a campaign the right way — the grassroots way: **For every $2,500 donation one of our opponents might get, we rely on about 100 of our grassroots donors to step up at our average gift of just under $25.** The good news is we have hundreds of thousands of working folks from across the country on our side. I've gotta ask:
[**_Peter, will you contribute your first $5 — or our average campaign donation of $25? If enough folks reading this decide to chip in even a few bucks, together we can show reporters, the political media, and our opponents that our true grassroots movement is unstoppable._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28684?refcode=em20210826-2415&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2415%2E434096%2EP5o46E)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28684?refcode=em20210826-2415&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2415%2E434096%2EP5o46E)**
Thank you, thank you, thank you. 🙏
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. **For every $2,500 donation one of our opponents receives, Team Fetterman needs to get about 100 of yinz to donate our average gift of just under $25 to keep pace.** Are you up to it today, Peter? [** _If the answer is yes, please donate your first contribution to our campaign by clicking right here._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28684?refcode=em20210826-2415&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2415%2E434096%2EP5o46E)
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails-footer-test?refcode=em20210826-2415-footer-test-ctrl&t=26&refcode2=2415_434096_P5o46E&akid=2415%2E434096%2EP5o46E)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=27&akid=2415%2E434096%2EP5o46E)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=2415%2E434096%2EP5o46E)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: [URGENT] REPLY REQUESTED (via DCCC)
subject: asking for your input, not money:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you CONDEMN Republicans' efforts to deny our voting rights?
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_)
| [**Do you CONDEMN Republicans ' efforts to deny our voting rights?**

**RESPONSE STATUS:****PENDING****
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com**
](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-)[ ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-) [](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/k2R-)[CONDEMN REPUBLICANS NOW >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
_**This is a live petition. Please enter your response before our midnight deadline.**__
_
---

We're THRILLED:

Because our House Democrats just passed HISTORIC legislation to SAVE voting rights and defend our democracy.

But, we're also disgusted:

**Because not a SINGLE Republican supported the bill!**

We wish we could say we're surprised, but we're not.

Because ever since Donald Trump's humiliating defeat, Republicans have:

\-- **LAUNCHED** more than 400 voter suppression bills across the country,
\-- **PUSHED** deadly conspiracy theories about election fraud,
\-- and even **INCITED** a deadly insurrection at our nation's Capitol.

**We can 't let them get away with their attacks on our most sacred right to vote.**

[**So we 're calling on our very best grassroots supporters to rise up and tell us they CONDEMN Republicans for yet again denying our voting rights**](https://links.e.dccc.)

[CONDEMN REPUBLICANS NOW >>](https://links.e.dccc.)

Thank you,

DCCC

However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45521273&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2NjM5MTY1NwS2&l=13870087&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. name: Keystone Progress Education Fund
subject: Keystone Progress in your neighborhood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www

We believe the strongest messengers for civic engagement are community members and neighbors, and that's where YOU come in! [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34711222/302831580/-1194778760?contactdata=Ww2cNRGwJWmiY62lBRInG5C1n%2FaCu0i%2FAoxdV5RC7vh0384QgBDvT2aA%2FlCjL7FduFP80jupIKkDOCQNhXqUYyKwm0eyIi%2FTjzssbaBKH2Cy8YSb0xM7cTNP0d02cUwFxCoaxz7C65Ag%2FOkZczioFQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyZWRiYzY4LWFjMDYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WXAsLRHDLQ18RSi-JFDeYzKrfKyxNTdxUV8mx3YoqbE=&emci=4184e464-3e04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f2edbc68-ac06-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2038134) Dear Friend, With unprecedented attacks on our Democracy and our democratic ideals increasing daily, it is time to fight back NOW by working to bring as many folks into the civic arena as possible to make their voices heard. **Keystone Progress is hard at work on the ground in Western Pennsylvania, working in traditionally under-organized communities to increase political engagement.** We are:
* Offering voter education and registration at community events in Lawrence, Beaver, and Indiana counties and more.
* Launching a Disability Constituency-led Voter Registration Education and Turnout Initiative all across Western PA.
* Engaged in a massive voter registration initiative at Indiana University of PA through our newly launched PA Colleges Vote program.
* Providing Voter Education and Covid-19 related public health information to neighborhoods in Erie County.
* Raising awareness around upcoming anti-choice legislation in the PA legislature.
* Training progressives through our Participate PA series.

We believe the strongest messengers for civic engagement are community members and neighbors, and that's where YOU come in! **We need YOU, because who knows your community better?** **[`Please consider volunteering with Keystone Progress Education Fund by filling out the form found at the link. We can't wait to work with you.`](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34711225/302831586/-1194778760?contactdata=Ww2cNRGwJWmiY62lBRInG5C1n%2FaCu0i%2FAoxdV5RC7vh0384QgBDvT2aA%2FlCjL7FduFP80jupIKkDOCQNhXqUYyKwm0eyIi%2FTjzssbaBKH2Cy8YSb0xM7cTNP0d02cUwFxCoaxz7C65Ag%2FOkZczioFQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyZWRiYzY4LWFjMDYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WXAsLRHDLQ18RSi-JFDeYzKrfKyxNTdxUV8mx3YoqbE=&emci=4184e464-3e04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f2edbc68-ac06-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2038134)** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34711227/302831588/-1194778760?contactdata=Ww2cNRGwJWmiY62lBRInG5C1n%2FaCu0i%2FAoxdV5RC7vh0384QgBDvT2aA%2FlCjL7FduFP80jupIKkDOCQNhXqUYyKwm0eyIi%2FTjzssbaBKH2Cy8YSb0xM7cTNP0d02cUwFxCoaxz7C65Ag%2FOkZczioFQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyZWRiYzY4LWFjMDYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WXAsLRHDLQ18RSi-JFDeYzKrfKyxNTdxUV8mx3YoqbE=&emci=4184e464-3e04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f2edbc68-ac06-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2038134) Thank you. ** ** **Keystone Progress Education Fund** | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34711229/302831590/391245949?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyZWRiYzY4LWFjMDYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WXAsLRHDLQ18RSi-JFDeYzKrfKyxNTdxUV8mx3YoqbE=&emci=4184e464-3e04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f2edbc68-ac06-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2038134)

body:

This same platform has banned hundreds of thousands of Christians - including our former President and myself - for being too "dangerous." While the Taliban erased 20 years of American progress, I was barred from the same platform because I dared to question the Covid vaccine. **If you are a Christian conservative in the United States of America, you are treated worse and have less freedom online than the Taliban.[You can see the video for yourself here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58194678:JcRDKj2No:m:1:3253819041:A693FCB99988B3E1903B09DED326BA8F:r "You can see the

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: Not great.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
It is no surprise big money is pouring into this race to beat Mark. It happened last time too. But if we stand together, we’re going to win.
#

**Good News:** Our campaign for Senate had more individual donations in the first six months of 2021 than ANY other Senate campaign in the country. You should be very proud of that fact.
**Bad News:** This grassroots support has made us a huge target with a number of outside dark-money groups spending millions to beat Mark. CNN even said this seat was one of the most likely to flip from red to blue.
What’s more, our average donation amount is down big this week. Normally it’s around $25, but this week it’s under $20. Not great.
So that means we have two choices: either we need A LOT more donations before our end-of-month fundraising deadline ends, or we need people to chip in a little more than usual.
Normally we ask first-time online donors to contribute $3. But today, we’re asking if you can dig a little deeper and chip in $10. It would mean a lot to Mark and to our chances.
[**Can you please make a $10 contribution to help Mark before his critical end-of-month fundraising deadline comes to a close? He cannot do this without your help.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210826-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1200_6688874__9nfl0&akid=1200%2E6688874%2E_9nfl0)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210826-1-15&t=20&refcode2=1200_6688874__9nfl0&akid=1200%2E6688874%2E_9nfl0)**

clean_body: It is no surprise big money is pouring into this race to beat Mark. It happened last time too. But if we stand together, we’re going to win. Good News: Our campaign for Senate had more individual donations in the first six months of 2021 than ANY other Senate campaign in the country. You should be very proud of that fact. Bad News: This grassroots support has made us a huge target with a number of outside dark-money groups spending millions to beat Mark. CNN even said this seat was one of the most likely to flip from red to blue. What’s more, our average donation amount is down big this week. Normally it’s around $25, but this week it’s under $20. Not great. So that means we have two choices: either we need A LOT more donations before our end-of-month fundraising deadline ends, or we need people to chip in a little more than usual. Normally we ask first-time online donors to contribute $3. But today, we’re asking if you can dig a little deeper and chip in $10. It would mean a lot to Mark and to our chances. Derek, this will be quick – and I really need your help:
1. We knew Georgia was going to be a critical battleground – _again_ – but now, POLITICO reports that our race will decide which party controls the Senate.
2. Republicans have made me one of their top targets for next year's critical elections, and they're already outspending us on misleading attack ads in order to smear my record and turn Georgia red.
3. Our grassroots campaign is **falling $17,871 short** of what we need to fight back, hit our midnight fundraising goal and win this race. **Unless we close this budget gap by midnight, the GOP's attacks could leave a major mark.**

**We cannot hand Georgia – and our critical Senate majority – back to Mitch McConnell and the GOP when everything from our voting rights to health care is under attack.** But according to analysts at _The Washington Post_ , that's exactly what could happen if we lose this battleground race.

**Please, Derek, I'm counting on you. With time running out before our critical midnight deadline, I'm asking you to give every dollar you can spare right now:**

We don't need to worry about outraising our opponent, but we do need to build the momentum necessary to WIN THIS RACE.

I'm a conservative because I believe all people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams. |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=3efb07ec80654c74b48e016a40f12074&_e=SSGKEXrltTBQGWcucuT6xh9HcZJ9DK3MVLAAumq6N7UMdPDo_n3hTBEVZEJI59tfe3b9YnI971WHOwcx5AQuwV36AfNUBxT-bljCWsxuV6ZDTJ8tFNVnpTaI1mj12NIS5n-Z5hu0I8HQcsmC0dlxK1P_964qmVj5zM7_i3cubuqHEWer63wIZlqKMm-xethY5SxY0Psd82bjjf1LLJ-Z8OI2rVOdkJty0Wn4_kRnS4MzYZCVA-W4FAaXtb1FDjyO47Lr03dxAiLkWB5ZPnyj2sd1J1kaBxNQRyzo1T27nacg-YNFdK6PuwaQlNrzEZtaBLkYILRHCtA6_ZRgFofYSsGzaxwmMLJLup-fj0lgXQeKo6KajMMIIWnUEUWz3G8fIwX1GHINSKPKX6iIg8OizWeVKPTQo04MXbzL-6-Z9oM4BgwTpjyauPX7EzzyGGFQ2dO7bsOSykYlilgi05XeuA%3D%3D)

Peter,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=3efb07ec80654c74b48e016a40f12074&_e=SSGKEXrltTBQGWcucuT6xh9HcZJ9DK3MVLAAumq6N7UMdPDo_n3hTBEVZEJI59tfe3b9YnI971WHOwcx5AQuwV36AfNUBxT-bljCWsxuV6ZDTJ8tFNVnpTaI1mj12NIS5n-Z5hu0I8HQcsmC0dlxK1P_964qmVj5zM7_i3cubuqHEWer63wIZlqKMm-xethY5SxY0Psd82bjjf1LLJ-Z8OI2rVOdkJty0Wn4_kRnS4MzYZCVA-W4FAaXtb1FDjyOgH4816js5NhGaAIo2z8vM23U8oYaxwfKAmQatIEaWrvx1_2x1fTxBdhABximN7urO6OPgmLLGYHsVHnXd0GjGjAwPrhdap9yppCyvxy96GHYqneL3TGUxbVgw4s8jy_kzmQk857yKCiUaVHr6nB4-XWoc8T2409mCm0KRXS11WYLJw1wq2gSoA-RN1dCIc2-0i77CcXKzlN2FtrHfNuz2w%3D%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=3efb07ec80654c74b48e016a40f12074&_e=SSGKEXrltTBQGWcucuT6xh9HcZJ9DK3MVLAAumq6N7UMdPDo_n3hTBEVZEJI59tfe3b9YnI971WHOwcx5AQuwV36AfNUBxT-bljCWsxuV6ZDTJ8tFNVnpTaI1mj12NIS5n-Z5hu0I8HQcsmC0dlxK1P_964qmVj5zM7_i3cubuqHEWer63wIZlqKMm-xethY5SxY0Psd82bjjf1LLJ-Z8OI2rVOdkJty0Wn4_kRnS4MzYZCVA-W4FAaXtb1FDjyOwzfPHZVzEfDz6osI9OWnPDIOH6vXCIOpVhWGFfktjoPmx9o6DAHaO-AJY87km42Z3n5HtvsD8Vkyxxm2FjJifDYEelnN_msflzAZE76jJgNEOm4s5IcgiXrp3n-JwAHYkmYuusX2gVn4es2TcA8QuTc662dH2Oca-73w8qWgh5t02Y57VbA3_ZgIDpoiJwtVwdptuKIvqdEEf_ErtWqSlw%3D%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team

At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=3efb07ec80654c74b48e016a40f12074&_e=SSGKEXrltTBQGWcucuT6xh9HcZJ9DK3MVLAAumq6N7UMdPDo_n3hTBEVZEJI59tfe3b9YnI971WHOwcx5AQuwV36AfNUBxT-bljCWsxuV6ZDTJ8tFNVnpTaI1mj12NIS5n-Z5hu0I8HQcsmC0dlxK1P_964qmVj5zM7_i3cubuqHEWer63wIZlqKMm-xethY5SxY0Psd82bjjf1LLJ-Z8OI2rVOdkJty0Wn4_kRnS4MzYZCVA-W4FAaXtb1FDjyOrkcze819Ndols2-tmTy5LXEPtjC5qLhz4xwQwaBdaUlYaQWEt-hBPLlpTD6X4Ktnh0HLNYUkaq82LRMG_ovI6MxOwjHR3wsxSCaCZm7XVIc9LoFvRtoDb183WlxXWBeJxZadtS_2b3OpBUWrmoZALrNoYNDE3SvWHEBo6DJtoRBY1XzTbb2_UQrKyYBviNcPfStuDulfYUshaWwe7C3A-w%3D%3D)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Reaching out to ask you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign before our August deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Friend,
I’m reaching out to ask you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign before our August fundraising deadline on Tuesday.
Will you give me a moment to explain why your $3 is so important? Here’s the short of it:
1. Pennsylvania is the most important Senate race in the country
2. That’s because the fate of our Senate majority hangs in the balance
3. So the race is super crowded _(and competitive)_ already
4. And it’s going to take a lot of hard work _(and resources)_ to replace Republican Pat Toomey with a Democrat who will fight for working families next fall

[If that’s all you need to know, will you make that $3 contribution to help us build an unstoppable coalition of working folks to win this race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34713485/302838707/-353695395?refcode2=96284119-b506-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210826-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjI4NDExOS1iNTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1JeVDaxLf9jGsy1rtQVqhKjQ6Vzh4DslROhjUoYwTPI=)
**[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34713486/302838708/-353695395?refcode2=96284119-b506-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210826-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjI4NDExOS1iNTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1JeVDaxLf9jGsy1rtQVqhKjQ6Vzh4DslROhjUoYwTPI=)**
Our strategy to win this race, even in a competitive, crowded field of candidates is simple.
We must build a huge coalition of working people — from all 50 states and every one of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties — behind our movement for healthcare, green union jobs, climate action, voting rights, and a real working person’s voice in the US Senate.
And supporters like you are the key to that strategy. That’s because donations from real working people like you are what fund our work.
When you chip in to our campaign, your dollars go right to work helping us build that coalition.
They pay for videos to share my story of growing up dirt poor in the North Philly projects, events to meet PA’s working voters, and grassroots organizing across the Commonwealth.
Now, we have a lot of that planned for September and October, but we have to hit our August fundraising goal to make it all happen.
And, to be honest, this month has been pretty slow for fundraising.
**That’s why I’m asking for your $3 today. If you can spare a few bucks ahead of Tuesday's deadline to help us build an unstoppable movement, it would mean so much.**
**[CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34713487/302838709/-353695395?refcode2=96284119-b506-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210826-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjI4NDExOS1iNTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1JeVDaxLf9jGsy1rtQVqhKjQ6Vzh4DslROhjUoYwTPI=)**
Thanks for being a part of our campaign to give working folks their own voice in Washington.
Malcolm

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC
---
Malcolm PAC
PO Box 22395
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, [click here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/91284119-b506-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/96284119-b506-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjI4NDExOS1iNTA2LWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1JeVDaxLf9jGsy1rtQVqhKjQ6Vzh4DslROhjUoYwTPI=&id=120380453) to unsubscribe. Peter,

Last night I was on Sean Hannity, **[and I wanted to make sure you saw the highlight reel!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195682:6NvhHj2Nh:m:1:3253819041:5A9536D2F0F7C0DF642C2AE6118E936D:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195682:6NvhHj2Nh:m:1:3253819041:5A9536D2F0F7C0DF642C2AE6118E936D:r)
As I discussed with Sean, I launched my Senate campaign in Georgia because **I believe in putting in hard work to achieve the American Dream. EVERYONE should have the opportunity to achieve their dreams.**

Unfortunately, our national leaders are too busy putting their self-interests first and playing politics to see the harm they are causing our country.

Americans are hurting and deserve a leader who will PUT THIS COUNTRY FIRST. I'm that leader, Peter, **[and it's why I'm asking for you to join my team today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195682:6NvhHj2Nh:m:1:3253819041:5A9536D2F0F7C0DF642C2AE6118E936D:r)**

[** CHIP IN $10 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195683:6NvhHj2Nh:m:1:3253819041:5A9536D2F0F7C0DF642C2AE6118E936D:r)
[** CHIP IN $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195684:6NvhHj2Nh:m:1:3253819041:5A9536D2F0F7C0DF642C2AE6118E936D:r)
[** CHIP IN $50 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195685:6NvhHj2Nh:m:1:3253819041:5A9536D2F0F7C0DF642C2AE6118E936D:r)
I have what it takes to stand up to D.C. politicians, WIN this race, and help WIN BACK the Senate majority. **[But I can't do it without your help, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195682:6NvhHj2Nh:m:1:3253819041:5A9536D2F0F7C0DF642C2AE6118E936D:r)**

I've played a lot of sports, and I know it takes a strong team to achieve a common goal. I know we have what it takes to win. With your help, we can BEAT our opponent this election.

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58195682:6NvhHj2Nh:m:1:3253819041:5A9536D2F0F7C0DF642C2AE6118E936D:r)
I appreciated Sean having me on his show because, Peter, even though I just announced my candidacy; this Senate race is already heating up.

subject: Would you support a vaccine mandate?

body:
Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, OR let the government enforce mandates? . Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=a43e795c328b4bcf980961cef710faea&_t=lnw8j8zDT2fjiGAJ-h_umD6hFcUwnnvk3GgvSVgoKjoW3eh3TNifT-CQZ3LBUbrxxggwmUH-UScY4FNiiNkVcd1QVSQvJO2LvuBuXQecVUQScpq6wYBxlHsHM9fvlCQmlDqDsDq7FuT5Ex3dKbd-uzO-6bLyZWJwuVret3ZZ0QM%3D)

---

Fellow American,

The radical left is talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond.

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 16 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a43e795c328b4bcf980961cef710faea&_e=4of3htY8DFaxM1wtjyPYCgioZwBiX5sZ24WCfk2g7a4x1E_q_QG5lDszQUrNCKx2yinGQiYQsrEiScek3dYmRzdKx5O74T4IPT8At_iAxx1Q7MnavXitRJH1uXYxuT4MZLEyn17LSyOkciIDZbWxKqGqBWj42tZp6-FFjP7KldaqrvGal8wU_vb4KN-HMnhG38cJIeW4kjS1WWK3-D1hMNs1LGTT3lR4KUYzU51_nSqaC_eft-TzIAMvaGFRyUxIae1oQwSBEng32C16n2S3Bg35yb98O3RAFYBX4dTLrZ2sPGP9JarnIHW0IN-MThc4VNGBasuyDE6K6twcFJQsQcJpejGd80NO5WqN-SZQ090h8801G6Mqxt36cG5PhSehjZOh2t3acvNaKM3wLOluVrK25_Ywbm_VrlMI135tAdXRadBZ483CYAM47CKsiRxOCsu6-QwUvI0Zj1uqMJuUZgG8kxHxM6wG-a8RjtSTNUYA_rs5TQH5zbo-LjmnkMjRLVaPR7Tnp-TKsVU_4ho5kg%3D%3D)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a43e795c328b4bcf980961cef710faea&_e=4of3htY8DFaxM1wtjyPYCgioZwBiX5sZ24WCfk2g7a4x1E_q_QG5lDszQUrNCKx2yinGQiYQsrEiScek3dYmRzdKx5O74T4IPT8At_iAxx1Q7MnavXitRJH1uXYxuT4MZLEyn17LSyOkciIDZbWxKqGqBWj42tZp6-FFjP7KldaqrvGal8wU_vb4KN-HMnhG38cJIeW4kjS1WWK3-D1hMNs1LGTT3lR4KUYzU51_nSqaC_eft-TzIAMvaGFRyUxIae1oQwSBEng32C16n2S3Bg35yb98O3RAFYBX4dTLrZ2sPGP9JarnIHW0IN-MThc4DIjDjWbVTgqtbW90cO7CvBeuEStVHMv0QCQq2WWMwhJvmGtcKKzrLY8BlTmORt2YByYaNgMBw7A5Cp4XbgYq11AWcvF3oq7G9niww_9vbMZp1zJGhaajmLgHQDoCkt2qTTN_TDnDhBFq2MyMu-K9XQmKmozo0RNzKSH-1J6akiHP-GrEBXOFHQCTxeAJIWHQMbVIW7qvksx_ROfPblCpPg%3D%3D)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, August 17TH

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a43e795c328b4bcf980961cef710faea&_e=4of3htY8DFaxM1wtjyPYCgioZwBiX5sZ24WCfk2g7a4x1E_q_QG5lDszQUrNCKx2yinGQiYQsrEiScek3dYmRzdKx5O74T4IPT8At_iAxx1Q7MnavXitRJH1uXYxuT4MZLEyn17LSyOkciIDZbWxKqGqBWj42tZp6-FFjP7KldaqrvGal8wU_vb4KN-HMnhG38cJIeW4kjS1WWK3-D1hMNs1LGTT3lR4KUYzU51_nSqaC_eft-TzIAMvaGFRyUxIae1oQwSBEng32C16n2S3Bg35yb98O3RAFYBX4dTLrZ2sPGP9JarnIHW0IN-MThc4yMhIVG4sD8uV23U9w_hS9Ve0xm4lS5JI9xOZY1MqYEMMOvp-qOT_7ygrVtBAaf5pnqQ3tfS4VAFKQdi35eZIsOBXO4MxulPb94vQV64FE2kB74Jz4zvU-dbQyvl4GmmRDbagpf35KXxMwECZHRcFq1u2AqD1gyxWPho-dB1HouRghClB9zAms2wR2G3PUCui09EYglnUvgOQXbGyBghkaQ%3D%3D)

---

One day soon Speaker Pelosi may require anyone working in the United States Congress to be vaccinated or face yet-to-be announced consequences. After that, it’s anyone’s guess as to who else will be required to get a shot. With what we know about how Nancy Pelosi operates; it wouldn’t be surprising if she is already doing her part to implement a country-wide vaccine mandate.

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!**

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine passports but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a43e795c328b4bcf980961cef710faea&_e=4of3htY8DFaxM1wtjyPYCgioZwBiX5sZ24WCfk2g7a4x1E_q_QG5lDszQUrNCKx2yinGQiYQsrEiScek3dYmRzdKx5O74T4IPT8At_iAxx1Q7MnavXitRJH1uXYxuT4MZLEyn17LSyOkciIDZbWxKqGqBWj42tZp6-FFjP7KldaqrvGal8wU_vb4KN-HMnhG38cJIeW4kjS1WWK3-D1hMNs1LGTT3lR4KUYzU51_nSqaC_eft-TzIAMvaGFRyUxIae1oQwSBEng32C16n2S3Bg35yb98O3RAFYBX4dTLrZ2sPGP9JarnIHW0IN-MThc4VCBXR83iutTZv8rGxhWBf_RHUYWbQAM1E9Br5oZpUaoY3EU83P9sSOxLd42UJkYDiYPV2zjmpnAmIk73pH3heMP0WQZWu5DJWcNYAWcJscDuJpTMTqVrconURWPMqIZDbSPPxMHwxxtO7OymcvTHdQ1X9heMKN2DLiJKwU88ui1yrY8ObFuLw-_Pk5A1uf6YguGmVSMVWnxyQVs8OEua8g%3D%3D)**

Thanks for letting us know –

Thank you,
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a43e795c328b4bcf980961cef710faea&_e=4of3htY8DFaxM1wtjyPYCgioZwBiX5sZ24WCfk2g7a4x1E_q_QG5lDszQUrNCKx2yinGQiYQsrEiScek3dYmRzdKx5O74T4IPT8At_iAxx1Q7MnavXitRJH1uXYxuT4MZLEyn17LSyOkciIDZbWxKqGqBWj42tZp6-FFjP7KldaqrvGal8wU_vb4KN-HMnhG38cJIeW4kjS1WWK3-D1hMNs1LGTT3lR4KUYzU51_nSqaC_eft-TzIAMvaGFRyUxIae1oQwSBEng32C16n2S3Bg35yb98O3RAFYBX4dTLrZ2sPGP9JarnIHW0IN-MThc4NE2I5bRxCc-ZAj55BgUhMUuyRhdgk1-eMPDhTA7m7b2lCo3LHB1vi4VZzUWSS7mQ6gdT3OFeBgBZA4eTRbyXxnP01KGempkIZnamlVcQ7m02UGeVQL3VYsYKlJT8S-iG4ynfzA80F2ka67w0R3y0Owwhd-2mW_WsoAJLG_LxvLzUA4imfGrsufvqcnampaFE2lrX5THdJoPhUzul_V6ZJg%3D%3D)
Jim Jordan

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?

name: Great America Update
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c308%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=XzgK5ft%2fpWVpr6eAp5mi1w&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Great American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65267%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P4JxRxxUKDWiBW%2fWN51cnA&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans--views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65268%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wv5JHVHP55ksA9hcueRCLA&sysid=1)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive--and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65269%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7lBfgo6dlGhhyEptN4WMTQ&sysid=1)
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c308%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=XzgK5ft%2fpWVpr6eAp5mi1w&sysid=1)_

clean_body: Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. | | | | | This sponsored message from Great American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans--views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive--and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | Warm Regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314 |

body:

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=6f9aa155bf0f453db77b94ba0701cef2&_e=ybTxyFjr3uLLlHvgtqhASt02eR78V_ZvoLuI2yBlLCVqGs5oKDm_29cNxLisanW_NqZvL2f40HAuM_dJ3Blzv1V3RdVG-MJVPvGfDapLcdUeluWR1WvZ1TBsFtOLAjwAhBcgmOeI1k8vbaGEipMDCKlhdcfad2SsTfJ_ZfSDRCAIfc05tN3ZNM19-npqEjCBKHyAV4fc95xb4atvV588RnCIFt7rdGsJ3r3RsUfLTiKhCXvZ_P0LbBcGKj9uANCl1z6sPZiELWhXjBAtSXuL871pBDEYoHyb-FgTDV0qXa2sof8Kx1o7kz_iJibqI3g2YjjfRTYxGhYORpDwMVnt3iJsCaMU7isUo3-3AjvXyhbUxIK9uVrWEPzWgVYyiRKqUc-Pq275jEqgoRL5gbzvuex_93pvSveey79OxyuAZ3-bpm8Q_m-waUS8FiIcdidc1PjRjKlBquOh7XRrX71QIQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Today in America, politicians pit American against American.

Rich vs. Poor. Black vs. White. Urban vs. Rural.

I don't believe in that garbage. It's a lie.

**[I'm Herschel Walker, and I want you to be among the first to know that I'm running to be the next United States Senator from Georgia.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=6f9aa155bf0f453db77b94ba0701cef2&_e=ybTxyFjr3uLLlHvgtqhASt02eR78V_ZvoLuI2yBlLCVqGs5oKDm_29cNxLisanW_NqZvL2f40HAuM_dJ3Blzv1V3RdVG-MJVPvGfDapLcdUeluWR1WvZ1TBsFtOLAjwAhBcgmOeI1k8vbaGEipMDCKlhdcfad2SsTfJ_ZfSDRCAIfc05tN3ZNM19-npqEjCBKHyAV4fc95xb4atvV588RnCIFt7rdGsJ3r3RsUfLTiKhCXvZ_P0LbBcGKj9uANClZOuSr385qEUvd7z7mEIVEyp0KIzL1BEbBAQLj9XR-NxIPzAdsLpPSYfc3g2QUd4JPRXiS4ZdTZCcQe8s7zkuc8iHSQtJ9B18yGNDd_gqu9oyC6IpBxGInW0W9MUIj3Vw78FCHwN-7RnOCTjIiAmreOdybyS4K_nmLtSYBTU1IIEdvYVyLfDYC_F2wTxLiEWPuJLLGGtPw3PIiIoIEpT4nQ%3D%3D)**

I'm a conservative who believes in smaller government, a strong military, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL people have the opportunity to pursue their dreams.

I will win this incredibly important race, but I need your help. **[I'm asking you to chip in whatever you can, whether it's $100, $50, or even just $10 to ensure I'm in the strongest starting position possible.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=6f9aa155bf0f453db77b94ba0701cef2&_e=ybTxyFjr3uLLlHvgtqhASt02eR78V_ZvoLuI2yBlLCVqGs5oKDm_29cNxLisanW_NqZvL2f40HAuM_dJ3Blzv1V3RdVG-MJVPvGfDapLcdUeluWR1WvZ1TBsFtOLAjwAhBcgmOeI1k8vbaGEipMDCKlhdcfad2SsTfJ_ZfSDRCAIfc05tN3ZNM19-npqEjCBKHyAV4fc95xb4atvV588RnCIFt7rdGsJ3r3RsUfLTiKhCXvZ_P0LbBcGKj9uANClL8DSDVVs1SGoG8TEh5GVhl_qsGYlntUzVSn2FUSUMwxOKQ5EPaVYYrxoB0UUOIkyZCpAs3oPefsV4z9jULAqU_A0HtT29OwhUDQwe7AgCTk3vwhmnuxhsUArxmn5LOlKiHhE8jSiVppuCH4OE1NWPAFgR06GP2iXzVXjZGtvYVH1MCqWVD1A14xf6flxJPw8TRN4515PDaFzhfdZzQowSg%3D%3D)**

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=6f9aa155bf0f453db77b94ba0701cef2&_e=ybTxyFjr3uLLlHvgtqhASt02eR78V_ZvoLuI2yBlLCVqGs5oKDm_29cNxLisanW_NqZvL2f40HAuM_dJ3Blzv1V3RdVG-MJVPvGfDapLcdUeluWR1WvZ1TBsFtOLAjwAhBcgmOeI1k8vbaGEipMDCKlhdcfad2SsTfJ_ZfSDRCAIfc05tN3ZNM19-npqEjCBKHyAV4fc95xb4atvV588RnCIFt7rdGsJ3r3RsUfLTiKhCXvZ_P0LbBcGKj9uANClIFDtuY5ZK6YRqiMz469nNzCYCJj67MlIF3o97qZeCyMnSr1BXdPvyghUDC1hHZoEGnHG7a4q0lCr5vIxgpvweQjzvp7ii6qfND1evTSBYbcww3jQnnIO8qL8VVSJ5VzeMRKarLKiYgnFh1xDtjSwSiZ2YoruCPlKWqPCGf-S_n2tiuAD6eZMh1XZDouKKxqipqB3JVnbnNtC6V9Px1TZoA%3D%3D)
At my core, I'm a runner. But I wasn't always fast.

I grew up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, where I learned discipline, faith in God, and the value of hard work. It's also where I trained non-stop and got _**real fast.**_

**I'm from a working-class family.** I was one of seven children, so you'd be correct to say my parents had their hands full. My childhood was a happy one - **even more so once I overcame a stutter and disciplined myself to get in strong physical shape.**

Growing up in Georgia, I learned about sacrificing the things you want in the moment for the future you know you can have ... _**if you work hard enough.**_

Growing up in Georgia, I also learned it doesn't matter where you come from, what your family has, or what color your skin is - if you want something bad enough and you're willing to work hard for it, you can achieve it.

You may know of me from my days playing college football at the University of Georgia, where I was awarded the Heisman Trophy in 1982.

I was blessed to be successful in college football, enough so that my college career paved the way for me to play football professionally for many years in the USFL and NFL.

My career took me all over the country. Despite living in New Jersey when I played for the Generals, Dallas when I played for the Cowboys, Minneapolis when I played for the Vikings, or Philadelphia and New York when I played for the Eagles and the Giants, respectively, **my heart was always in Georgia.**

And at this moment in time, I'm deeply concerned about the future of Georgia and our country.

**Unfortunately, a liberal Democrat was elected to the U.S. Senate from Georgia in a runoff election earlier this year, and he's now serving out the last two years of a beloved former Republican senator's term.**

**The future of Georgia - and our country - is too important for me to stand on the sideline as radical liberals take our country down the wrong path.**

_**That's why I'm running for the United States Senate.**_

[** Join My Offensive Team
Chip In Today -> **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=6f9aa155bf0f453db77b94ba0701cef2&_e=ybTxyFjr3uLLlHvgtqhASt02eR78V_ZvoLuI2yBlLCVqGs5oKDm_29cNxLisanW_NqZvL2f40HAuM_dJ3Blzv1V3RdVG-MJVPvGfDapLcdUeluWR1WvZ1TBsFtOLAjwAhBcgmOeI1k8vbaGEipMDCKlhdcfad2SsTfJ_ZfSDRCAIfc05tN3ZNM19-npqEjCBKHyAV4fc95xb4atvV588RnCIFt7rdGsJ3r3RsUfLTiKhCXvZ_P0LbBcGKj9uANClhVXWi6ifJ5_59TTEj7AQoKZTCDM57RFvJPFmo66e6wSw9t4cgDXOstff7wJawWiLJcQV504vxyX1LwgxC0M0ikk42c7vgg4RQy63XzlAlQ9y335WCgFIAXC9u8W9bF9lr_v-qjWPtigKyJjXQShbKwiglQGJjhXI4Xrw08vxCdQxnsq42eeAh54BBv5OWb0pfU9f7oXCN8Iw3dWVKFeTFQ%3D%3D)
I'm just a guy from a small town in Georgia who's been blessed by God to live the American Dream.

I'm ready to fight to keep that dream alive - for you too.

Very Respectfully,

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=6f9aa155bf0f453db77b94ba0701cef2&_e=ybTxyFjr3uLLlHvgtqhASt02eR78V_ZvoLuI2yBlLCVqGs5oKDm_29cNxLisanW_NqZvL2f40HAuM_dJ3Blzv1V3RdVG-MJVPvGfDapLcdUeluWR1WvZ1TBsFtOLAjwAhBcgmOeI1k8vbaGEipMDCKlhdcfad2SsTfJ_ZfSDRCAIfc05tN3ZNM19-npqEjCBKHyAV4fc95xb4atvV588RnCIFt7rdGsJ3r3RsUfLTiKhCXvZ_P0LbBcGKj9uANClfzchaDcdU541aXRiHl_HwR8LFYdoontChpj-hRtcw6WJZknSgxJNhsI__11IZNHTzFbd9IYs32oBGzX-W4ethYLTdsFg0Mn9CNxD1wn72fvlAgj0ihen5AC1txx2wPg0T-KwKNYhyRwJUCWAk12LWxnnaLUQjdQdJSYKxa-OLloyLnHDtXT9US--jyDx-LxZJTGgToCrPniG0ErX6GfIFA%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker

P.S. The liberals in Washington are going to unleash everything they've got to defeat me, so I need you on my team. **[Please help my campaign get off to a critically important start by donating $10, $20, or even $50 today.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=6f9aa155bf0f453db77b94ba0701cef2&_e=ybTxyFjr3uLLlHvgtqhASt02eR78V_ZvoLuI2yBlLCVqGs5oKDm_29cNxLisanW_NqZvL2f40HAuM_dJ3Blzv1V3RdVG-MJVPvGfDapLcdUeluWR1WvZ1TBsFtOLAjwAhBcgmOeI1k8vbaGEipMDCKlhdcfad2SsTfJ_ZfSDRCAIfc05tN3ZNM19-npqEjCBKHyAV4fc95xb4atvV588RnCIFt7rdGsJ3r3RsUfLTiKhCXvZ_P0LbBcGKj9uANClgotFt8UbaK250fOXaXP3Gl7rKQkwctecshoZQAqD2qcudeApJrm5ozchV3VbOfxiqhJzSo-A24gnAEtamWytxmz9mDUfO3IOdulCodL7S91srPyp2yWcdT-YihJaDLAgsD19XyfMHYbSN9oFB8_6ofd8eLTvt0TgEZRLMSKOfKc12zF007oEqJ3aaOyiu3DJyHR1cLe0bxu4M--hQ2T3BQ%3D%3D)** Thank you.

name: Larry Elder Recall Newsom
subject: Just 3 weeks to go
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
body:
With the election coming down to a “photo finish,” we can’t miss a single opportunity to get out every YES vote we can for the recall. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b81ecae4188b4cb69283cc881c54ac6e&_e=V3FvdRTCRJ5xIuVzDwhZwFNWm1qaidgrevCuur5tMX8YkoVQP7j2J0vqAEXX7vEIJ5R-qX7Mk7gcY5cgcG4J2Ry7F-p0VoBUS3rqrjuVltpF4-gaAVJqwxMCyEZNR9cHX0bOnJ6zZOrbS-sTjRq7W5XxEcZ2UN0KRs1HDg0EUPoaR8FNdGhjAaaaAUfgmClyDfUeH8sFXsAuEbN_Xjve2uBAyhING13iYzm7dk9uErTNbsKNUOmQY_S6zvjEzSxZ2giskojN1inacTC2H9RDea4zJ_ElRVLTo3W6HdQUeS_gimB1H-LU5tpR-aKd_pRUQY21yUGLUoLS9GQlr5Q94apYVESDx52RhyScFgQ0zOvbxhFlwyZMSzIZU7f3lcKK)

---
Fellow conservative,

We’re now counting down from just 3 weeks out from Election Day in the recall against failed California Governor Gavin Newsom.

Voting by mail has been going on for over a week now. Every day that goes by means thousands of more ballots are being returned with votes for, or against, the recall.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: ISIS in your app stores?
body:
As ISIS is plotting to kill Americans in Afghanistan, America, and other parts of the world, do you think they're passing hand-written notes over mountain passes?
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/doop763SI0YJqH9aQ7DNjq6g/5qPHAvvBWrykP98928wdy5BQ) | Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/doop763SI0YJqH9aQ7DNjq6g/5qPHAvvBWrykP98928wdy5BQ) As ISIS is plotting to kill Americans in Afghanistan, America, and other parts of the world, do you think they're passing hand-written notes over mountain passes?

Nope, they're using technology just like us - well like SOME of us who are not yet banned. Just today, ISIS-K is claiming responsibility for killing over ten US servicemen in Afghanistan.

So, you might be wondering, how are Islamic terrorists communicating?

Thanks to user-instigated flagging on Twitter and Facebook, terrorists sometimes have had a somewhat difficult time openly communicating and recruiting on social media.

Initially, they took to Facebook's WhatsApp, but now they have found a better communication hub called Threema.

You probably haven't heard of Threema as they're a small Swiss company.

**But you 've heard of Google and Apple which - TO THIS DAY - is hosting Threema in their app stores, the new preferred app of Islamic terrorists!**

While conservative social platforms like Parler and Gab continue to be banned in app stores, and deplatformed by Amazon's AWS, Big Tech has no problem looking the other way when terrorists need a platform to plot their attacks!

Tomorrow, I'm holding my final meeting to go over the last draft of my new lawsuit against Big Tech.

It's MASSIVE - but more importantly, it's one of a kind, and my lead attorney is one of the best in the country.

You and other supporters have been so generous in the past, and [**I could really use your help again to help cover these legal costs**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/doop763SI0YJqH9aQ7DNjq6g/5qPHAvvBWrykP98928wdy5BQ).

[**Would you be willing to invest $25 or go big with a $100 donation today?**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/doop763SI0YJqH9aQ7DNjq6g/5qPHAvvBWrykP98928wdy5BQ)

I have to cover another $4,200 by Wednesday and [**need you and around 150 others to help me out**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/doop763SI0YJqH9aQ7DNjq6g/5qPHAvvBWrykP98928wdy5BQ) with a gift of $25 or more.

If you can [**donate even $10**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/Cru7AUuOO8Nv0fLtCo4ieQ/5qPHAvvBWrykP98928wdy5BQ), it would absolutely help!

[**Help me strike a big blow to Big Tech by investing in this lawsuit.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/doop763SI0YJqH9aQ7DNjq6g/5qPHAvvBWrykP98928wdy5BQ)

Thanks again for all that you do, and I'll give you an update after my meeting tomorrow.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

body:
https://tinyurl.com/JoinTeamMia [https://tinyurl.com/JoinTeamMia]Dear Peter,
We are officially 5 DAYS away from August 31st, but we still need to make sure we meet our fundraising goals. Your donations have helped carry #teamMia this far, and they will continue to help carry us across the finish line!
Please join us in the upcoming days for several fundraisers happening this week and be part of the final push!

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/filipino.png]

From 4 - 5:30 pm join us for some fun as we all gather around to support the campaign and win this thing together! name: =?utf-8?Q?Mike=20Carey?=
subject: Mike Carey Statement on Kabul Airport Attacks
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/careyforcongress/mikecareystatement?e=f89184af42)
---
| | |
---
| | | August 26, 2021
**OH-15 Candidate Mike Carey Statement on Kabul Airport Attacks**
_Columbus_ \- Mike Carey released the following statement on the attacks in Kabul.

"This is a tragic day for America. I pray for the U.S. service members and civilians killed in Kabul today as well as those injured and their families.

President Biden owns responsibility for this outcome. He ignored the warnings from his top generals, he allowed the Taliban to dictate terms to the United States, and he has left Americans stranded in the hands of terrorists.

I call on the President to keep his promise of a swift and forceful response. I also call on Congress to reconvene and pass legislation to ensure every American is safely removed from Afghanistan on our timeline, not the Taliban’s.” ### Contact
Blaine Kelly
blaine@careyforcongress.com
614-517-7440

|

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: Today’s horrific events…
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7dadff98480f/todays-horrific-events?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
## Today’s horrific events...
The events of today proved just how dangerous and real the threat remains in Afghanistan and the sacrifice that servicemen and women continue to make.The last several days are the result of a lack of planning and leadership by President Biden and his administration. My thoughts and prayers are with the families of the service members lost today in Afghanistan.
Will be following this story live on _Spicer & Co_ tonight, tune in for more of my thoughts and the latest.
| | | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c2279f7de6&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
# Pre-Order _Radical Nation_ ...
_Radical Nation_ is one of the first comprehensive looks at the Biden administration and the leaders within it. “ _**RADICAL NATION**_ is critically important. My friend Sean perfectly diagnoses the problems with the Biden presidency and what we can do to save our nation.” **— CHARLIE KIRK**|
---
[Pre-order your copy here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=fbe5679bc9&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=772a8e1b87&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[Why the Media Is Worse for Biden Than Trump](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=4fcc2dd822&e=f6564bbe3b) via New York MagazineThis made me laugh. Thanks ⁦Jonathan Chait for being such an out of touch elitist.
|
---
[U.S. officials provided Taliban with names of Americans, Afghan allies to evacuate](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b20d566433&e=f6564bbe3b) via PoliticoHow could anyone think giving a terrorist group a list would turn out anything but horrible We need a list of US official that did and approved this.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d4960ea71a&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
Last week I asked if Joe Biden was handling the pullout of Afghanistan well, the answer was a [resounding no](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=e6123ad8c3&e=f6564bbe3b). Now I want to know:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9571d91aac&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a3451ae7eb&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
## What I’m reading this week...
Joel Rosenberg’s brand new book, _Enemies and Allies_ is a must read considering how the events today are shaping the world. He is one of the only people who has spoken directly to almost every major Middle East leader. |
---
[Get a copy here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=29db191ef0&e=f6564bbe3b)

name: Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
subject: I lost a seat in Congress by just 6,588 votes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=4a5061f1fca64004a3dfe9183f59bd5a&_e=ke74_8ejxZE0ua91algotbDVa0STm219GqKx97mDq80q6eqZQR2cjvCggtsaAdHdpdwv0I-Fh2rEAr_qsDQXm9mtqNVj2dFNAIwGqQoXogvsM87TQCDdGKHcGp18Io54Sc3Iq-rYHCMI0S6L83ID7VAjJhFTqVpDQf2T43IQu9pbapLvP8sqRaaHGMtWdjLoMR_GQNM7L50tsarh9ALy4VZSyL7axaOVR-6DV1ucqGtmLIHYDuN9A4L9RDpmm2gJUvVDpyLBmEOXotrB9RPjNBrgdLd2i9kJ5AM_WI731IKh8AIecmN-XbCEgvyI_DK91Gn0xV_VoECwX9d2CD6rSSg7dc-tZ8EtWA0Lg8y_H4VYRpRuXps8xmrH2X3qlqhIaJeBIANFcYdXursvTJXYbaAW1Gm2zfU7J1poqKnNn8e_qT-0aKmFjZ0PIuFE7GqzfV8J_356-1w8tzwuMKVPacmUckohNRBC93WirWzkCSY%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Latinos were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Latino,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, **a proud Latina Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=4a5061f1fca64004a3dfe9183f59bd5a&_e=ke74_8ejxZE0ua91algotbDVa0STm219GqKx97mDq80q6eqZQR2cjvCggtsaAdHdpdwv0I-Fh2rEAr_qsDQXm9mtqNVj2dFNAIwGqQoXogvsM87TQCDdGKHcGp18Io54Sc3Iq-rYHCMI0S6L83ID7VAjJhFTqVpDQf2T43IQu9pbapLvP8sqRaaHGMtWdjLoMR_GQNM7L50tsarh9ALy4VZSyL7axaOVR-6DV1ucqGtmLIHYDuN9A4L9RDpmm2gJUvVDpyLBmEOXotrB9RPjNG_I9JDF_spaW_2gzS9jyh9I8-NXxHqYSLUHdrwAJQ6sLWd-xQPduOgm858iHuulESfVdYBvb8t-VhLtQQPABFp24lWwLgOOAFmjr-IKcUm0zhxycJ5R-CxZUeMjNpZQ8iYUi8vpAet7vQ-kDPy6V3a7Ns2cGu1qVXmKSFnAxXRGBSs6GyeRBaJc9uGyEt7Tv-LIEHT5z-aEYu5g8b5-TpE%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS⇒ ](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=4a5061f1fca64004a3dfe9183f59bd5a&_e=ke74_8ejxZE0ua91algotbDVa0STm219GqKx97mDq80q6eqZQR2cjvCggtsaAdHdpdwv0I-Fh2rEAr_qsDQXm9mtqNVj2dFNAIwGqQoXogvsM87TQCDdGKHcGp18Io54Sc3Iq-rYHCMI0S6L83ID7VAjJhFTqVpDQf2T43IQu9pbapLvP8sqRaaHGMtWdjLoMR_GQNM7L50tsarh9ALy4VZSyL7axaOVR-6DV1ucqGtmLIHYDuN9A4L9RDpmm2gJUvVDpyLBmEOXotrB9RPjNEjCTRHcq6goh8g2HxiSxb1MZTZHctfKsIP7mZzmhYV5MT-jbBosHOQ4RFPFgW8C85pw1YT5zlM-eGGuhQ5wr_cWOiYia57rb7MWr8aSM-QI_axyhqN_0SwZJ6ElHsVqe05PMPRi-T5sniPyfNY2GIHD2TpbYYHNMWwz58i2urKChydnGLIZ-UR0lyLD_ZlgqdRqJiLIdAyiL61OjNuvtbs%3D)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Latinos?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=4a5061f1fca64004a3dfe9183f59bd5a&_e=ke74_8ejxZE0ua91algotbDVa0STm219GqKx97mDq80q6eqZQR2cjvCggtsaAdHdpdwv0I-Fh2rEAr_qsDQXm9mtqNVj2dFNAIwGqQoXogvsM87TQCDdGKHcGp18Io54Sc3Iq-rYHCMI0S6L83ID7VAjJhFTqVpDQf2T43IQu9pbapLvP8sqRaaHGMtWdjLoMR_GQNM7L50tsarh9ALy4VZSyL7axaOVR-6DV1ucqGtmLIHYDuN9A4L9RDpmm2gJUvVDpyLBmEOXotrB9RPjNDxLaaEEJy5xAwS-w96hFHBbmqhFWKcuoPhDeyFnO4OKdo2nqGpD4HYyDDRtQ_u1qf-Reu8MzsHr5ncT9IXBkiRF3aBGGvk0mLenPRQsbXUWL40dVnC0zrGl5ymxsi2CfcTl0BAjRyMDNzrKz9iWT77RguBm6KVrd9h4-2MMzhlgiiCHvagZKApYY58XG3emsy7SKW7y2yG-V1Bb4z2bFug%3D)

I’m not a “coconut” - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a “self-hating Latino,” as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, a proud Latina Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY. Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by just 6,588 votes. I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others. As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority. In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more brown Republican women of color. Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.” But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable. name: Bruno Amato
subject: The news out of Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress
body:
| | |
---
Folks — I have been following the news all day as we learn more about the devastating attacks that occurred today in Kabul. My thoughts are with all the families of U.S. and Afghan personnel who were killed and to all who were wounded in these attacks. As a U.S. Navy veteran, I can only imagine the bravery and extreme difficulty of the ongoing evacuation missions by service members and Afghan allies. I know we are indebted to folks who are putting their lives on the line in order to make sure we can safely evacuate as many people as possible. I will be continuing to monitor the situation as it unfolds. The same cannot be said for Kevin McCarthy. If you think he cares about the safety and service of U.S. personnel and Afghans whose lives are in danger, think again, folks. This guy doesn’t care one bit about service members or our country. He only cares about his political ambitions. He is using the ongoing evacuations — which have already surpassed 70,000 people in the past two weeks alone — and twisting the story to fit his own narrative that will make him more money and raise his profile among the extreme far-right supporters. In a seven minute interview on Fox News, CNN reported that McCarthy made five false claims including a racist, false statement of Afghan prisoners “coming across our borders.” **Now, he’s grandstanding about the sacrifice of our service members, the safety of Afghan evacuees, and politicizing these horrific attacks for his own gain. His record shows he voted against actions that would have helped prevent the severity of the current situation in Afghanistan.** It’s disgusting behavior, folks. My heart goes out to the families of the fallen, the thousands of Afghans who’ve been forced to leave their home, the thousands of veterans who served time in a twenty year war that had no point or solution, and all those who are continuing to make sure our mission to evacuate as many people and exit Afghanistan is complete. Bruno Amato

name: Heidi St. John for Congress
subject: 🆘 State of Emergency! 🆘
body:
This is a crisis this nation has not experienced since 9/11.
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---|---
|
Friends,

We are in a State of Emergency and have been for a very long time. We are watching the disastrous Biden Administration destroy our Republic and our positive influence in the world, from the horrifying news of more Americans killed in Afghanistan to our never-ending crisis at the border.

Even here in Washington State we have unbelievable problems with a tyrannical governor. Desperation is also hitting our friends and families close to home.

I am concerned about the hearts and health of our people.

Everywhere I go across this district I am hearing from people in the most dire circumstances. Doctors, law enforcement officers, fire fighters, government workers, nurses, teachers, waitstaff, marijuana dispensaries, you name it! All losing their jobs because they don't want to receive the COVID vaccine or they have already had the virus and don't feel like they need it.

You should always be given the choice to make an informed decision about a vaccine, and should never have to choose between your livelihood or submission for one. Our medical freedoms are absolutely being infringed upon, and people are suffering from increased mental health issues because of the ocean of false and misleading information out there.

This must stop. It is insanity! Do not comply.

This is a crisis this nation has not experienced since 9/11.

Please do not lose heart. Do not lose hope. We must band together. We must link elbows and stay in the fight together!

clean_body: This is a crisis this nation has not experienced since 9/11. | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | Friends, We are in a State of Emergency and have been for a very long time. We are watching the disastrous Biden Administration destroy our Republic and our positive influence in the world, from the horrifying news of more Americans killed in Afghanistan to our never-ending crisis at the border. Even here in Washington State we have unbelievable problems with a tyrannical governor. Desperation is also hitting our friends and families close to home. I am concerned about the hearts and health of our people. Everywhere I go across this district I am hearing from people in the most dire circumstances. Doctors, law enforcement officers, fire fighters, government workers, nurses, teachers, waitstaff, marijuana dispensaries, you name it! All losing their jobs because they don't want to receive the COVID vaccine or they have already had the virus and don't feel like they need it. You should always be given the choice to make an informed decision about a vaccine, and should never have to choose between your livelihood or submission for one. Our medical freedoms are absolutely being infringed upon, and people are suffering from increased mental health issues because of the ocean of false and misleading information out there. This must stop. It is insanity! Do not comply. This is a crisis this nation has not experienced since 9/11. Please do not lose heart. Do not lose hope. We must band together. We must link elbows and stay in the fight together! | | | == | Be inspired. Hang in there. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Murdered Marines
body:
As I'm writing this, the number of United States Marines and US servicemen murdered by ISIS terrorists in Kabul is increasing.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/fNUiz1AqMh7hgctK8QHhag/Rb2Ikf21VtE8zeVtuFAnlQ)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/fNUiz1AqMh7hgctK8QHhag/Rb2Ikf21VtE8zeVtuFAnlQ) As I'm writing this, the number of United States Marines and US servicemen murdered by ISIS terrorists in Kabul is increasing.

The Biden Regime and Nancy Pelosi want us to look the other way and pretend this didn't happen as they retreat from Islamic terrorists.

While Joe Biden and the White House have remained silent on the attack, Nancy Pelosi is tweeting up a storm - about the Women's Suffragettes movement in America.

How out of touch are the Democrats???

Patriot, have you had enough yet?

I'm working hard to get elected so I can fight for you in Congress

I want to fight for our troops, for our safety, for our families, and the American values we all hold dear.

My heart goes out to the family members of the servicemen and women who paid the ultimate sacrifice today in Afghanistan as a result of failed Democrat leadership while these brave servicemen and women were doing their jobs to protect Americans and innocent Afghans from Islamic terrorists in Afghanistan. We have not had a US soldier lose their life in 18 months, making today a tragic day for our nation, adding 12 more Gold Star families to the roster.

Last week, in response to Joe Biden's handling of his disastrous withdrawal from Afghanistan, he said, "the buck stops with me".

So, we need to hold him accountable!

We have four days until our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we're falling short.

[**Can you chip in right now?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/fNUiz1AqMh7hgctK8QHhag/Rb2Ikf21VtE8zeVtuFAnlQ)

Our nation and our national security depend on electing fighters to Congress who are going to hold Joe Biden and the Democrats accountable for their dangerous, and now deadly national security policy failures.

It's time for us to push back by flipping Congress RED and reigning in the Biden Regime through 2024.

We can't hold back!

And I'm asking you to not hold back right now.

[**Donate any amount that you can today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/fNUiz1AqMh7hgctK8QHhag/Rb2Ikf21VtE8zeVtuFAnlQ)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Stay tuned,

Laura Loomer

name: Culp for Congress
subject: HORRIFYING: Biden and America Last
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BGankX&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EJQby6y&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/58105416-a9cf-445c-bb04-15dc974ac9a1.png]

Biden continues his "America Last" campaign.

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/5b35f717-5c68-4fc3-9850-c69fc180709c.jpeg]
Biden and his administration have allowed billions of dollars worth of military equipment to be handed over to the Taliban...

...And now 14 American Servicemembers are dead and countless Afghans are dead or injured. Every American citizen has seen the absolute failure of Biden's leadership that has endangered and cost American lives in Afghanistan and endangered us here in America. It is clear to the American people Biden and his administration have no understanding of foreign policy, or peace through strength.

It was clear that civilians and military equipment should have been removed before our military withdrew.

Now the Taliban is gloating over their new weaponry and our American leaders are failing to even help evacuate American citizens from the hell Biden and his administration have created.

RINO's like Dan Newhouse helped create this problem.

Newhouse showed his true colors when he voted to unconstitutionally impeach President Trump. Newhouse's voting record continues to show his eagerness to side with the radical Dems despite the fact that their agenda is tearing apart our country,

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/2dd91669-226a-4665-91f3-d23d26b3890a.jpg]
We must have dedicated public servants who will stand for our constitution and our individual freedoms!

The laws of our great nation have checks and balances, and it was designed by our founding father's to ensure that "we the people" can continue to enjoy our rights and freedoms granted by our Creator. The radical Democrats and RINOs in Congress (like Dan Newhouse) are ignoring their sworn duty to uphold and defend the constitution. That is why "we the people" can no longer stand by and accept their blatant disregard for the oath they swore.

We need men and women in Congress who will uphold the laws that have made America the beacon of freedom to the world.

I will always follow the constitution and hold those in office accountable for violating the laws of our great land. We need public servants, not politicians. We need everyday American to say enough and to support America First candidates.

I will continue to fight for the American people. I will take a stand, and I need you to take a stand with me.

Stand up for America.

Loren
