body:
It's #WomensEqualityDay, so consider this your reminder that women make up just 26% of Congress. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34722599/302881981/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3OWU1MDE3LWU5MDYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r-43u9ZoYBE5eRXfEJHBUvC0uTNDeO-P074GGFkxn6k=&emci=14313576-e606-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d79e5017-e906-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2884131) Hi Peter, Simona Grace here, **California Mother of the Year 2020** and Founder of Moms in Office. It's **[#WomensEqualityDay](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34722600/302881982/-1985526436?src=hashtag_click&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3OWU1MDE3LWU5MDYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r-43u9ZoYBE5eRXfEJHBUvC0uTNDeO-P074GGFkxn6k=&emci=14313576-e606-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d79e5017-e906-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=2884131)** , so consider this your reminder that women make up just 26% of Congress and moms with children under 18, less than 10%. **Here is what I have to say about this.** **Don't celebrate us-- elect us.** In 2018, I was inspired to start an organization to help elect more moms like Katie Porter so single moms like me can have better representation in Congress. **[I am reaching out to you today to help us fund our Katie Porter Childcare Fund so that we can pay for our candidates' childcare. Can I count on you today to chip in?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34722601/302881983/600483780?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3OWU1MDE3LWU5MDYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r-43u9ZoYBE5eRXfEJHBUvC0uTNDeO-P074GGFkxn6k=)** While many campaigns consider non-election years to be “off-years,” our work to achieve real progress for moms never stops. We have seen an unprecedented number of women run for office during the last election cycle, because of women's organizations like us who were there to support their campaign**.** **[Will you make a contribution today to support our Childcare Fund as we lead this work to elect more moms to office?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34722602/302881984/600483780?refcode=0812&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3OWU1MDE3LWU5MDYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r-43u9ZoYBE5eRXfEJHBUvC0uTNDeO-P074GGFkxn6k=)** Moms in Office is working tirelessly to provide targeted support programs for candidates with caregiving responsibilities that will make it possible for them to win big. [**Be one of the 57 or more supporters needed from your area by chipping in what you can and help us fully fund our Childcare Program for 2022.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34722603/302881985/600483780?refcode=0812&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3OWU1MDE3LWU5MDYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTUwMWFjNTdiYTNlZCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r-43u9ZoYBE5eRXfEJHBUvC0uTNDeO-P074GGFkxn6k=) Any amount that you are able to donate will have a huge impact on our year-round fundraising work and it will keep our support programs going that are so important for our candidates' success. Thank you for being part of our movement to elect more moms. Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office Katie Porter **#momsquad** |

clean_body: It's #WomensEqualityDay, so consider this your reminder that women make up just 26% of Congress. Hi Peter, Simona Grace here, California Mother of the Year 2020 and Founder of Moms in Office. It's , so consider this your reminder that women make up just 26% of Congress and moms with children under 18, less than 10%. Here is what I have to say about this. Don't celebrate us-- elect us. In 2018, I was inspired to start an organization to help elect more moms like Katie Porter so single moms like me can have better representation in Congress. = While many campaigns consider non-election years to be “off-years,” our work to achieve real progress for moms never stops. We have seen an unprecedented number of women run for office during the last election cycle, because of women's organizations like us who were there to support their campaign. = Moms in Office is working tirelessly to provide targeted support programs for candidates with caregiving responsibilities that will make it possible for them to win big. = Any amount that you are able to donate will have a huge impact on our year-round fundraising work and it will keep our support programs going that are so important for our candidates' success. Thank you for being part of our movement to elect more moms. Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office Katie Porter #momsquad | I will chip in to pay for childcare! = = = = = | | | | ---|---|---|--- Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: I believe in a free America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
We have progress |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e0d11cbd03&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am the State Representative in Arizona who has been leading the charge for Election Integrity since Day one.

**With your continued support and the force of the strongest grassroots movement in a generation, we have made tremendous strides.**

Demonstrating and providing ample evidence that the election was stolen in Arizona and that victory should likely be credited to Donald Trump, a movement has begun that has spread around the country.

With strong efforts in key swing states in Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Georgia, and with a tremendous push to recall Governor Newsom in California, we are on a historic upswing for Conservatism.

And make no mistake, the issue on the ballot is the soul of our nation, the one thing that makes America truly America, the integrity of our elections.

And this is why I am writing you today, in need of your continued support. [I need your help to not only continue the fight for election integrity, but to lock down our elections for good as Secretary of State of Arizona.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b9facd8b83&e=44b8c466b0)

_We are on a deadline._

Right now, we are spreading the #ProveIt movement like wildfire and we need more campaign materials, literature, staff, and volunteers to fan the flames.

This costs money, and the iron is hot. [For us to reach our end of month goal, we need to raise an additional $27,500 by September first. Can you help us with this goal with a donation today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=be000a8989&e=44b8c466b0)

And why do we need to make this push now?

It’s simple. The final results of the Maricopa Audit which I helped spearhead are being released soon. And there is already a wave of Fake News media trying to discredit it – before the results are even released.
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cdd622ec8b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Newsweek “reports:”

_As Cyber Ninjas prepares to present its findings from a widely criticized audit of the 2020 election results in Arizona's Maricopa County, some Republicans are strongly criticizing the process the Florida-based company followed._

_Trey Grayson, a Republican who served as Kentucky's Secretary of State from 2004 to 2011, dismissed the trustworthiness of the audit in remarks to the Associated Press published on Sunday. "There are too many flaws in the way this review was conducted to trust it," Grayson said._

_Arizona's state Senate Republicans had used biased and inexperienced contractors to carry out the audit, he said, adding that they often used unusual and unreliable methods to conduct the process. Arizona Republicans had also turned to funders who readily promoted conspiracy theories._

**To be clear, the ink has not even dried on final reports yet to be released and major news outlets are trying to discredit them.**

This is because the Fake News knows the results will be catastrophic to their narrative.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a67b722f62&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _And this is where you come in._

There are two main ways to get an idea out there. The first is organically.

**This is what you see with the Fake News. Part of the reason the Democrats were able to steal the election with such reckless abandon is because the propaganda machine of the Fake News spews lies 24/7 brainwashing the public. **

_No one needs to pay them. They are allies of the Left._

Try and imagine a world where the mainstream media reports “Terrible Fraud uncovered in Maricopa County – Evidence is shocking.”

**It’s not going to happen, no matter what the evidence is. You know how biased the Fake News is.**

This brings us to the second way we can get this information out there. _By paying._
Unfortunately, when we have the Leftist dominated mainstream media fighting us and propagandizing against us, getting the REAL NEWS out there costs a premium.

**And the end of the month coincides with a critical media blitz that we will be doing to make sure that EVERYONE knows the results of America’s Audit, no matter how the Fake News Media tries to hide and suppress it.**

[_Please, help us today to reach our end of month fundraising goal, so that we can convert the results of Maricopa’s Audit into real action!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=79cf44ab12&e=44b8c466b0)

Folks, I have been writing to you to months, keeping you updated on the life of the Election Integrity movement. I have been writing to you from my heart.

**I believe in a Free America, one where my vote counts. One where the voice of every American is heard and respected.**

_And right now, that America is under attack. There are only two words that can save that America._

**_Election. Integrity._**

**_Period._**

As always, I continue to appreciate your support in this grassroots movement of epic proportions. _[Every donation counts, no matter how big or how small.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=773d05bddd&e=44b8c466b0)_

One day, I envision writing you, saying we’ve won. The Fake News Media can’t lie anymore, the evidence is too great.

**But until that point – it’s you and me versus the establishment, and its Conservatives versus the Media. **

**_And that is why we must stay strong together._**

[_Donate today to join the #ProveIt movement!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=051d1ce9a1&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=49e2da1584&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=37a06912cf&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=e65d9ad388) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=e65d9ad388).
